title: Lean Ninja - JL6
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* The role leads enterprise scale AI first Lean transformation by integrating Lean Six Sigma GenAI automation process intelligence and analytics led decisioning
* The role is accountable for shaping strategic and transformation themes influencing senior stakeholders building scalable methods and assets and enabling portfolios to deliver measurable productivity quality risk reduction client value and experience outcomes

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Independently lead portfolio level Lean value stream and opportunity discovery interventions translating current state waste bottlenecks and variability into AI first future state operating models
* Create and govern transformation roadmaps that combine Lean Six Sigma GenAI process transformation RPA workflow automation analytics dashboards and change adoption
* Act as SME and advisor to senior leadership process excellence leaders project leaders sponsors and practitioners on Lean Six Sigma and AI enabled process transformation
* Build pilot and institutionalize scalable frameworks toolkits assessment models prompt libraries value stream templates automation qualification logic and governance assets
* Help allocated units meet YOY efficiency client value and quality commitments through structured benefit realization controls and adoption management
* Lead knowledge management for the Lean repository and continuously upgrade it with standardized reusable and AI enabled assets
* Convert intervention and operational data into insights themes executive narratives and action plans using dashboards analytics and stakeholder review cadences
* Ensure responsible secure and human centered use of GenAI and automation by embedding risk checks usage guardrails validation loops and adoption readiness into solution design

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Strong understanding of Waterfall Agile SAFe ITIL ITSM and project service management tools ability to tailor Lean interventions to delivery context
* Working knowledge of GenAI enabled productivity prompt engineering basics knowledge workflows AI assisted analysis workflow automation and automation qualification
* Ability to define Lean automation GenAI operating models including opportunity pipeline prioritization business case controls metrics ownership and adoption plan
* Advanced problem solving statistical thinking data storytelling and data visualization Power BI and analytics toolkit exposure preferred
* Strong senior stakeholder management consulting orientation facilitation executive communication and change management capability
* Awareness of responsible AI principles risk management data privacy security and human in the loop validation for AI assisted process changes

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Foundational\-\>Quality models/improvement frameworks\-\>Lean based improvement methodology,Foundational\-\>Six Sigma\-\>Master Black Belt,Technology\-\>AI\-Generative AI\-\>Generative AI \- Basic

title: Avaloq Senior Developer - Tech Lead | 9 to 20 Years | Pune
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Avaloq Senior Developer / Tech Lead:**


Capgemini – WealthTech \& AI Practice Capgemini is expanding its WealthTech practice, supporting leading financial institutions in transforming their wealth management platforms. .


We are looking for Senior Avaloq Developers / Tech Leads who want to go beyond pure technical delivery and evolve into true technico\-functional experts — combining deep platform expertise with a strong understanding of wealth management business processes.


**Primary Skills**
------------------


**Your Profile:**


* 10\+ years of Avaloq development experience


* Strong expertise in: o Avaloq parameterization and customization o Avaloq Message Interface (AMI) is an advantage


* Solid knowledge of at least one of the following domains: Trading, Credit \& Loans, Client Lifecyle, Portfolio Management, SWIFT \& Settlement


* Solid experience with: o Oracle / PL\-SQL o Unix / shell scripting


• University degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent • Avaloq Certified Professional (ACP) is a strong advantage


* Good understanding of Wealth Management / Private Banking products


**Technical \& Professional Skills:**


* Strong capabilities in software development and Avaloq parameterization


* Ability to design efficient and scalable solutions


* Experience in: o Requirements analysis o Technical solution design o Code quality and review practices


* Analytical, structured, and solution\-oriented mindset


* Ability to lead complex development streams and support team members


* Excellent communication skills with both technical and business stakeholders


**AI Driven Banking and Career Growth at Capgemini**
----------------------------------------------------


**Grow Beyond Development:**


At Capgemini, we believe that strong developers should evolve into technico\-functional Subject Matter Experts (SMEs). We actively support this journey by:


* Providing structured, multi\-month training programs combining technical and functional learning


* Giving exposure to real banking processes and Avaloq modules in production environments


* Supporting continuous development through mentoring, certifications, and validation milestones Our objective is clear: \- Enable strong technical profiles to develop deep functional expertise \- Build consultants who understand both how Avaloq works and how banks operate


**AI and the Future of Banking:**


The banking industry is evolving rapidly with the rise of AI and data\-driven technologies.


At Capgemini, you will benefit from:


* Training programs on AI, data, and emerging technologies


* Insights into how AI is expected to impact wealth management platforms and processes


* Opportunities to develop skills aligned with next\-generation banking environments


**Why Join Capgemini:**


* Be part of an Avaloq practice built with strong ambition


* Work on large international transformation programs


• Combine deep technical expertise with business understanding • Access global opportunities within a 350,000\+ employee organization


* Strong delivery and training ecosystem in India (200,000\+ professionals)


* Collaborative environment focused on learning, growth, and long\-term careers


**Join Us**

If you are passionate about Avaloq, WealthTech, and building expertise beyond development, and want to play a key role in shaping future\-ready banking platforms, we would be delighted to hear from you.


**Grow Beyond Development:**


At Capgemini, we believe that strong developers should evolve into technico\-functional Subject Matter Experts (SMEs). We actively support this journey by:


* Providing structured, multi\-month training programs combining technical and functional learning


* Giving exposure to real banking processes and Avaloq modules in production environments


* Supporting continuous development through mentoring, certifications, and validation milestones Our objective is clear: \- Enable strong technical profiles to develop deep functional expertise \- Build consultants who understand both how Avaloq works and how banks operate


**AI and the Future of Banking:**


The banking industry is evolving rapidly with the rise of AI and data\-driven technologies.


At Capgemini, you will benefit from:


* Training programs on AI, data, and emerging technologies


* Insights into how AI is expected to impact wealth management platforms and processes


* Opportunities to develop skills aligned with next\-generation banking environments


**Why Join Capgemini:**


* Be part of an Avaloq practice built with strong ambition


* Work on large international transformation programs


• Combine deep technical expertise with business understanding • Access global opportunities within a 350,000\+ employee organization


* Strong delivery and training ecosystem in India (200,000\+ professionals)


* Collaborative environment focused on learning, growth, and long\-term careers


**Join Us**

If you are passionate about Avaloq, WealthTech, and building expertise beyond development, and want to play a key role in shaping future\-ready banking platforms, we would be delighted to hear from you.

Job Description

title: Product Specialist(T)
description:
Job Summary\- Data Migration Developer.
  
PAN India.
  
End to end data migration from different source system to PTC Windchill.
  
Expert in ETL process concepts and standard tools.
  
Independent effective contribution to data migration activities as a data migration expert.
  
  

Responsibilities
  
Should be able to own and work with customer to do the data mapping between source and target systems.
  
Ensure the 100% measurable data quality of data migrations.
  
Able to understand the quality standards and compliances relevant to healthcare data.
  
Skills and experience
  
Bachelor or masters degree in Information Management Data Management Information Technology or equivalent
  
7 to 12 years of experience in data migration to PTC Windchill and related process areas with a total experience of more than 5 years in IT industry.
  
Must have the knowledge of PTC Windchill Bulk Migrator (WBM) tool and the PTC Windchill based PLM functionality.
  
Must have the knowledge about the PTC Windchill database and database tables.
  
Strong \& clear communicator.
  
Flexible to work and learning new technologies in the data management area as needed.
  
  

Certifications Required
  
Certification in Windchill and PLM will be added advantage

title: C# Winform
description:
**Your Role**


As a **C\# WinForms Developer**, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable enterprise applications using .NET technologies and modern frontend frameworks. You will work closely with cross‑functional teams including product, UI/UX, and backend teams to deliver high‑quality, performant, and user‑friendly solutions.


In this role, you will:


* Design, develop, and maintain desktop applications using **C\#, WPF**, and **WinForms.**
* Apply **Object\-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts and SOLID principles** to build scalable and maintainable solutions.
* Implement industry\-standard Design Patterns to improve application architecture and code reusability.
* Develop, optimize, and maintain databases using **Microsoft SQL Server**.
* Write efficient SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and triggers.
* Perform code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards and best practices.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve application issues in a timely manner.
* Collaborate with business analysts, QA teams, and stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver solutions.
* Create technical documentation and participate in architectural discussions.
* Continuously improve application performance, security, and reliability.

**Your Profile**


**Technical Expertise**


Preferred Skills


Experience with **MVVM architecture in WPF applications**.


Familiarity with Dependency Injection and IoC containers.


Knowledge of Unit Testing frameworks (MSTest, NUnit, xUnit).


Exposure to Agile/Scrum development methodologies.


Experience with REST APIs and integration with backend services.


**Core Skills**


* Self‑motivated and capable of working **independently with minimal guidance**.
* Strong analytical, debugging, and problem‑solving skills.
* Good communication and collaboration abilities.
* Ability to adapt to evolving technologies and project requirements.
**What You’ll Love About Working Here**


* Opportunity to work on modern full‑stack technologies and enterprise applications.
* Collaborative work environment with focus on innovation and professional growth.
* Continuous learning opportunities to enhance technical and domain expertise.

**About Capgemini in India**


Capgemini is an AI‑powered global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations realize their future through technology, data, and people. With nearly **60 years of heritage**, Capgemini is a responsible and diverse organization with **420,000 team members across more than 50 countries**. The Group reported **global revenues of €22\.1 billion in 2024**.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly **235,000 team members** working across **13 locations**, including Bengaluru, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Noida, Gurugram, and more. We deliver end‑to‑end services across **strategy, technology, engineering, and operations**.


**Make it real \|** **www.capgemini.com/in****‑en**

title: Tax Senior-EMEA-RDM-German Tax Compliance-HYD/BLR
description:
Deloitte Tax Services India Private Limited offers professionals the opportunity to support global clients through specialized tax compliance services in a dynamic delivery environment. As a Tax Consultant II supporting German Tax Compliance, you will work on individual tax return compliance and connected activities while collaborating with teams in India, Germany, and the broader Deloitte network. This role offers exposure to cross\-border tax processes, global stakeholder interaction, and opportunities to build technical and operational capabilities in a growing practice.

**Work you'll do**


As a Tax Senior on the German Tax Compliance team, you will be responsible for:


Prepare and support German tax compliance activities for individual taxpayers, including tax returns of varying complexity and connected services such as tax office inquiries and tax briefings.


Monitor client information, including work status and contact details, and manage the setup and coordination of the compliance process.


Identify and document issues, prepare client queries, and respond to technical questions from clients in coordination with the engagement team.


Maintain and update trackers and status reports for internal and external reporting purposes while communicating regularly with the team on client status and progress.


Collaborate with onshore and offshore stakeholders to support timely, accurate delivery and provide exceptional client service across the compliance lifecycle.

**The team**


The Tax practice is comprised of professionals who perform different income tax compliance processes including: Preparation of income personal income tax returns, review of tax assessments resulting thereof, dealing with tax authorities’ inquiries as well as questions from the global assignees themselves, tax briefings with global assignees, performing tax calculations in accordance to an employer’s policy. You will work with tax professionals in Hyderabad, Bengaluru, the onshore teams in Germany and other member firms in the global network to assist with these services with exceptional customer service. Comprehensive training will be provided to equip you with the necessary functional and technical skills


Location: Hyderabad/Bengaluru


Shift Timings: 11 AM to 8 PM IST

**Qualifications**

**Required:**


Full\-time Bachelor of Commerce, Master of Business Administration, or equivalent degree with 60% or higher marks or equivalent cumulative grade point average


5\-8 years of experience in tax compliance, individual tax return preparation, or connected tax support services


Experience managing compliance workflows, client information, and status tracking activities


Experience documenting issues, preparing client queries, and responding to stakeholder questions


Knowledge of Microsoft Office products, including Excel and Word


Knowledge of accounting principles


Ability to work in an 11 AM to 8 PM IST shift

**Preferred:**


Familiarity with DATEV


Experience supporting German tax compliance engagements


Experience working with cross\-border labor or global mobility tax matters


Experience working with global or cross\-border teams

  


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Oracle Cloud Technical Analyst
description:
**Oracle Cloud Technical \- Analyst, Managed Services**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations maximize value from enterprise technologies across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations. As a Cloud Technical Consultant within Managed Services, you will support clients in maintaining, enhancing, and optimizing cloud\-based solutions that enable business performance and operational continuity. Deloitte’s practitioners bring together technology experience, process knowledge, and delivery discipline to help organizations address complex operational needs, improve system performance, and support ongoing transformation in a dynamic business environment.

**Level**: Analyst or equivalent


As an experienced Analyst at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

**Work you'll do**


As a Analyst, Managed Services on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Supporting Oracle Cloud technical operations across managed services engagements, including issue analysis, defect resolution, and system enhancements
* Developing and maintaining reports, interfaces, extensions, and data conversion components using SQL, BI Publisher, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting Studio, and File\-Based Data Import templates
* Supporting integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud, Service\-Oriented Architecture, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, and Web Services Description Language\-based services
* Performing production support activities, including queue monitoring, ticket updates, incident and problem management, and resolution within service\-level requirements
* Collaborating with functional, technical, onsite, and offshore teams to support deployments, code migration, testing, and ongoing system improvements

**The team**


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 2\-3 years of experience in Oracle Cloud technical implementation, support, or managed services
* Experience developing conversions, interfaces, and reports using SQL, BI Publisher, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting Studio, and File\-Based Data Import templates
* Experience supporting 2\-3 Oracle Cloud modules, including navigation, tables, and end\-to\-end process flows
* Experience developing or supporting integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud, Service\-Oriented Architecture, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, or Web Services Description Language
* Experience with BI Publisher reports, Enterprise Scheduler Service jobs, and data conversions using File\-Based Data Import templates
* Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, problem, and enhancement management
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering, computer science, or business

Preferred:

* Experience delivering 2\-3 integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud or Service\-Oriented Architecture
* Experience with production support activities, including queue monitoring, ticket tracking, and service\-level agreement\-based resolution
* Experience applying cloud integration patterns in Oracle Cloud environments
* Experience with business intelligence security roles
* Experience with code migration, code reviews, naming standards, and technical quality practices
* Experience with performance tuning and SQL optimization
  

  

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. title: GenAI - Software Specialist Engineer II
description:
**GenAI \- Software Specialist Engineer II**

**Role Overview****:** As *a GenAI Engineer*, you will actively engage in your engineering craft, taking a hands\-on approach to multiple high\-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive GenAI \& engineering craftmanship across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your strong track record in delivering high\-quality, outcome\-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a dependable team player, collaborating with cross\-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.

**Key Responsibilities****:**

**Outcome\-Driven Accountability:** Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high\-quality, lean designs and implementations.


**Technical Leadership and Advocacy:** Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring code integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals. Lead requirement analysis, component design, development, unit testing, integrations, and support.


**Engineering Craftsmanship:** Maintain accountability for the integrity of code design, implementation, quality, data, and ongoing maintenance and operations. Stay hands\-on, self\-driven, and continuously learn new approaches, languages, and frameworks with significant focus on infusing AI/ML/GenAI where possible/appropriate. Create technical specifications, and write high\-quality, supportable, scalable code ensuring all quality KPIs are met or exceeded. Demonstrate collaborative skills to work effectively with diverse teams.

**Customer\-Centric Engineering:** Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams before, during, and after delivery to ensure the right solution is delivered at the right time.

**Incremental and Iterative Delivery:** Adopt a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a learning\-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions.


**Cross\-Functional Collaboration and Integration:** Work collaboratively with empowered, cross\-functional teams including product management, experience, and delivery. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well\-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.

**Advanced Technical Proficiency:** Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including AI/ML/GenAI, Agile methodologies and DevSecOps to deliver daily product deployments using full automation from code check\-in to production with all quality checks through SDLC lifecycle. Strive to be a role model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery. Demonstrate understanding of the full lifecycle product development, focusing on continuous improvement and learning.

**Domain Expertise:** Quickly acquire domain\-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs, architectures, and UX/UI designs into technical specifications and code. Be a valuable, flexible, and dedicated team member, supportive of teammates, and focused on quality and tech debt payoff.

**Effective Communication and Influence:** Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence teammates and product teams through well\-structured arguments and trade\-offs supported by evidence. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.

**Engagement and Collaborative Co\-Creation:** Engage and collaborate with product engineering teams at all organizational levels, including customers as needed. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co\-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.

**The team****:** US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost\-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom\-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting\-edge internal and go\-to\-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.

**Key Qualifications****:**


§ A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.
§ Strong software engineering foundation with deep understanding of OOPs, data\-structure, algorithms, code instrumentations, beautiful coding practices etc.
§ 5\+ years of experience with AI/ML, with last 2 years focused on GenAI as well as technologies like OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, LangChain, Agents, Vector databases, and approaches like Prompt Engineering, fine\-tuning, etc.
§ Proven experience in: Python, R, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, Julia, ML libraries, NLP, etc.
§ Proven experience with big data technologies, Angular, React, NodeJS, Python, C\#, .NET Core, Java, Golang, SQL/NoSQL.
§ Proven experience with cloud\-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro\-services on cloud hyper\-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.
§ Strong understanding of methodologies \& tools like, XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc.
§ Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.**How You will Grow:** At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.

description:
**AMS Solution Architect**
--------------------------


**Job title:** **AMS Solutions Architect**  

**Location: Bengaluru/Mumbai**


**Grade:** **E1/E2**


**The Opportunity**
-------------------


Capgemini is seeking a Director/Sr Director level executive whose responsibilities will include:


* Managing solution architecture for strategic deals and experience across multiple technologies (TCV: US$ 20Mn\+)


* Extensively worked on outsourcing presales (application \& multi\-tower) with end\-to\-end ownership to build/ lead \- win themes, core estimation \& transformation solution, proposal defense and BAFO/ contract negotiations support


* Creating innovative technology solutions and roadmaps on multiple key areas – vendor consolidation, cost optimization, delivery models transformations or packaged solutions. Ideal candidate should be able to work with experts across these areas to build technology transformation proposals and roadmaps for clients


* Driving cross functional team and lead value propositions to the clients and to present them to senior client stakeholders


**Additional Responsibilities**
-------------------------------


1\. Translate client objectives and requirements in RFPs into winning solution concept for specific deals, based on service offerings and capabilities


2\. Develop optimum outsourcing solution including Governance structure, delivery model, staffing, service location, service hours, service levels, enabling tools to client, transformation approach, commercials etc.


3\. Maintain win plus down selection rate of 60% on pursuits worked on or owned


4\. Ability to harness the best of the organization’s portfolio of offers to meet the stated and unstated requirements of the deal


5\. Ability to understand the competitive landscape and tailor the solution to counter these to propose the most differentiating solution to the client


6\. Participate in strategic initiatives to industrialize the solutions process and to enhance the competitiveness of AMS proposals


7\. Provide domain knowledge to assist with building competency skills within the team


8\. Maintain high utilization rate on AMS pursuits throughout the year. (\> 85%)


9\. Instances of formal/ informal contribution to the team through knowledge/ information sharing.


**Ideal Candidate**
-------------------


He/She/They will have 20\+ years of experience in AMS/ADM with a strong project track record . A Bachelor’s degree is required;


This person is motivated to deliver high\-quality work to drive customer satisfaction. They use their intellect, insight, and ability to build creative solutions with clients and colleagues while embracing a collaborative mindset. Key qualifications include:


* Prior experience with MNCs or tier one IPPs


* SAP experience would be advantage


* Having ITILv3 or PMP/ PRINCEII certifications will be added advantage


* Extensive presales role on RFP and RFI responses, preferably in Application management outsourcing with high conversion rate for new logos.


* Good awareness of key principles of large transformation engagements


* Technology width and understanding of industry trends. (SAP, Custom Apps, Digital, GenAI)


* Excellent interpersonal skills to be able to lead discussions with multiple internal and external stakeholders


* Exposed to complete lifecycle of \- Solutioning, Transition, Steady state \& Optimization


* Good understanding of AMS Estimation, various pricing methods and commercial aspects


* Good understanding of competitive bidding scenario, competitors and bench markers


* Experience with DevOps, SAFE Agile will be added advantage.


* Strong team orientation \& leadership qualities


* Excellent verbal and writing skills a must


* Demonstrated thought leadership in external forums or have done so,


Extensively travelled and willing to travel at short notice


* Prior experience with MNCs or tier one IPPs


* Having ITILv3 or PMP/ PRINCEII certifications will be added advantage


* SAP experience would be advantage

* Inbound, Outbound, Inventory, Replenishment, Audit, Returns, Shipping.

* Strong communication skills and ability to work with global stakeholders.
**What you'll love about working with us**

title: Oracle Cloud Integration Consultant
description:
**Oracle Cloud Integration \- Analyst, Managed Services**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations maximize value from enterprise technologies across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations. As an Oracle Cloud Integration Consultant within Managed Services, you will support the design, development, and ongoing management of integration solutions that connect Oracle Cloud applications with enterprise and third\-party systems. Working with experienced advisors and technical specialists, you will help deliver scalable solutions, support reliable data movement across platforms, and contribute to operational improvement and business transformation through managed services delivery.

**Level**: Analyst or equivalent


As an experienced Analyst at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

**Work you'll do**


As a Analyst, Managed Services on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Designing, developing, and supporting Oracle Integration Cloud integrations between Oracle Cloud applications and enterprise or third\-party systems
* Building and maintaining inbound and outbound integration flows using Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, BI Publisher extracts, and File\-Based Data Import processes for Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud
* Using Structured Query Language, Procedural Language/Structured Query Language, XML Schema Definition, Web Services Description Language, and Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations to support data movement, transformation, and interface development
* Monitoring, debugging, migrating, and optimizing integrations, including large\-file handling, encryption and decryption in File Transfer Protocol environments, and issue resolution
* Providing production support across incident, problem, and enhancement management activities, including queue monitoring, ticket updates, service\-level agreement tracking, and coordination with stakeholders and delivery teams

**The team**


Enterprise Performance


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 2\-3 years of experience designing, developing, or supporting Oracle Integration Cloud integrations
* Experience designing and developing Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud integrations using Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, and File\-Based Data Import uploads
* Experience extracting Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud data using BI Publisher reports within Oracle Integration Cloud
* Experience providing technical development support for inbound and outbound Oracle Integration Cloud integrations
* Experience with Structured Query Language, Procedural Language/Structured Query Language, XML Schema Definition, Web Services Description Language, Simple Object Access Protocol services, Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations, and Representational State Transfer services
* Experience with Oracle Integration Cloud monitoring, debugging, migration, large\-file handling, and encryption or decryption in File Transfer Protocol environments
* Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university

Preferred:

* Experience with Oracle Visual Builder and Oracle Integration Cloud customizations
* Experience supporting Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning, Human Capital Management, or third\-party application integrations
* Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, problem, and enhancement management
* Experience providing production support, including queue monitoring, ticket management, service\-level agreement tracking, and issue resolution
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Generative AI Architect
description:
**Architecting the Future:** Agentic AI \& Enterprise Transformation
  
Join us in shaping the next wave of enterprise innovation through Generative and Agentic AI.
  
We are seeking a pragmatic futurist and business\-savvy technologist to redefine how enterprises operate in the AI\-first era . This strategic role is available across Cognizant’s key delivery locations in India .
  
You will lead the design, adoption, and scaling of Generative and Agentic AI ecosystems for our most strategic clients.
  
This role blends advisory, hands\-on solutioning, and practice\-building leadership to ensure AI delivers tangible, industry\-specific business outcomes .
  
Core Responsibilities
  
Architect \& Implement Enterprise AI Ecosystems
  
Design and implement modular, scalable AI platforms that integrate Large Language Models (LLMs), Small Language Models (SLMs), and multi\-agent orchestration . Ensure architectures are cloud\-native, secure, and industry\-compliant .
  
Drive AI Strategy
  
Serve as the anchor architect for major client accounts. Lead C\-level discussions to define AI roadmaps that link technology to measurable business outcomes. Influence long\-term investment strategies.
  
Industry\-Specific AI Solutions
  
Envision, Design and Deliver verticalized AI use cases across one or more industries, including Banking \& Financial Services, Consumer Goods, Energy \& Utilities, Healthcare, Insurance, Life Sciences, Logistics, Manufacturing, Media, Retail, Telecom, and Travel \& Hospitality.
  
Develop, Train \& Optimize Models
  
**Lead end\-to\-end model lifecycle :** data preparation, training, fine\-tuning , deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement. Balance LLM vs. SLM adoption for cost, latency, and performance optimization.
  
MLOps \& LLMOps Leadership
  
Establish enterprise standards for MLOps/LLMOps pipelines (CI/CD, monitoring, observability, drift detection, compliance). Build agent lifecycle governance frameworks for scalable, auditable AI systems.
  
People Leadership \& Practice Building
  
Mentor and grow a community of architects and engineers . Build capability squads in GenAI/Agentic AI. Shape the company’s AI practice , including skills development, hiring strategy, and succession planning .
  
Ecosystem \& Partner Engagement
  
Build and leverage strategic partnerships with hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP), ISVs, and AI startups. Co\-develop joint offerings, influence partner roadmaps, and co\-sell AI solutions into strategic accounts.
  
Innovation \& Thought Leadership
  
Publish white papers, frameworks, and patents . Lead executive roundtables and contribute to the Tech Radar , ensuring the firm shapes the AI conversation in the market.
  
Required Skills \& Experience
  
15\+ years in IT \& architecture , with clear progression from hands\-on engineering (Java/.NET preferred) into enterprise architecture leadership.
  
5\+ years in AI/ML , with 1\+ year in Generative \& Agentic AI (LLMs, SLMs, multi\-agent orchestration).
  
**Model Training Expertise :** Fine\-tuning (SFT, RLHF, LoRA/QLoRA), RAG, evaluation pipelines.
  
**Hyperscaler Certifications :** Architect\-level expertise in at least two (AWS, Azure, GCP).
  
**MLOps/LLMOps Mastery :** CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, observability, compliance, AI cost governance.
  
**CxO Advisory :** Proven experience leading executive AI strategy discussions with Fortune 500 clients.
  
**Governance Expertise :** Familiar with AI RMF (NIST), EU AI Act, Responsible AI practices .
  
**People Leadership :** Experience mentoring teams and building cross\-functional AI capability practices .
  
**Ecosystem Influence :** Track record shaping AI initiatives through partner alliances (hyperscalers, startups, ISVs) .
  
Good to have.
  
Publications, patents , or open\-source contributions in Agentic AI, LLMOps, or model compression/distillation .
  
Recognized thought leadership (conferences, panels, media interviews).
  
**Industry domain depth in at least one vertical:** Banking \& Payments, Consumer Goods, Energy \& Utilities, Healthcare, Insurance, Life Science, Logistics, Manufacturing, Media, Retail, Telecom, Travel \& Hospitality
  
Experience with AgentOps, model evaluation frameworks, and AI observability tooling .
  
Functional Competencies
  
**Business Acumen :** Identify and execute high\-value AI transformations across industries.
  
**Consultative Mindset :** Convert PoCs/PoVs into long\-term transformation programs .
  
**Practice Builder :** Mentor, hire, and scale AI architecture talent pools .
  
**Ecosystem Shaper :** Drive co\-innovation with hyperscalers, startups, and ISVs.
  
**Pragmatic Execution :** Balance build\-vs\-buy , deliver under pressure, and navigate enterprise politics.
  
**Translation \& Storytelling :** Distill complex AI concepts into clear executive\-ready narratives .

title: MSD D365 Architect
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


This role ensures that solutions meet business needs, adhere to best practices, and integrate seamlessly with enterprise systems.


* Design end\-to\-end architecture for Dynamics 365
* Define integration strategies with other enterprise applications and third\-party systems.
* Provide guidance to development teams on customizations, configurations, and deployments.
* Conduct architecture reviews and ensure compliance with standards.
**Your Profile**
----------------


* Work with business analysts and functional consultants to translate requirements into technical designs.
* Implement robust security models and ensure compliance with data governance.
* Optimize system performance and scalability.
* Stay updated on Microsoft ecosystem advancements and recommend improvements.
**What you'll love about working with us**
------------------------------------------


* We value flexibility and support a healthy work\-life balance through remote and hybrid work options.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.
* Career development programs and certifications in cloud technologies.
* A diverse and inclusive workplace that fosters innovation and collaboration.
Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.


Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.

description:

-------------------------

  

* A day in the life of an Infoscion
* As part of the Infosys consulting team your primary role would be to get to the heart of customer issues diagnose problem areas design innovative solutions and facilitate deployment resulting in client delight
* You will develop a proposal by owning parts of the proposal document and by giving inputs in solution design based on areas of expertise
* You will plan the activities of configuration configure the product as per the design conduct conference room pilots and will assist in resolving any queries related to requirements and solution design
* You will conduct solution product demonstrations POC Proof of Technology workshops and prepare effort estimates which suit the customer budgetary requirements and are in line with organization s financial guidelines

* If you think you fit right in to help our clients navigate their next in their digital transformation journey this is the place for you

title: Senior Consultant | Java | Chennai | Engineering | Platform Development & Integration
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108557
Date: Jul 13, 2026
Location: Chennai
Designation: Senior Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**What impact will you make?**

  

Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services,

**Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivalled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.**

 **The Team**

Deloitte Digital has created a new model for a new age: The Creative Digital Consultancy. We're transforming the digital journey in a way an agency or traditional consultancy alone cannot–now leaders across their entire organization can come to one place to have their ambitions brought to life. We combined the creative and digital capabilities of our studios and the broad reach of an advertising agency with the technical experience, deep business strategy, and relationships of one of the world's largest consultancy to create something that is so much more than the sum of its parts. We can help you imagine bigger and scale as your business grows. Learn more about Digital

 **Work you’ll do as a Sr. Consultant and Consultant**

  

The primary role of a Consultant or Sr. Consultant is to be responsible for managing specific sub\-work stream (or sub\-modules) within a broader project. Sr. Consultants and Consultants on engagements report into the team lead/ manager and are responsible for end to end delivery of the sub\-work stream allocated to them.


The responsibilities of Sr. Consultant or Consultant should include:

* Perform maintenance on existing programs.
* Provide innovative and cost\-effective engineering solutions.
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities.
* Hands on experience with **Angular,** SpringBoot / Spring MVC.
* Hands on experience with MangoDB and any RDBMS
* Experience with cloud services like (AWS/Azure/Google Cloud)
* Strong hands on work experience in Design \& development of Responsive Web application
* Experience in **Web Services(REST, SOAP)**
* Hands on experience with **HTML(5\), JavaScript, CSS, Bootstrap, Angular (2\+), React JS, Vue JS**
* 
* Good understanding of object\-oriented programming, RDBMS, NoSQL
* Good analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
* This role involves extensive travel
* Experience with cloud services like (AWS/Azure/Google Cloud)

 **Good to have skillsets**

* Knowledge or implementation experience in Microservices based architecture.
* Kubernetes, Docker containers
* Building hybrid mobile applications (Ex: Flutter, React Native, Ionic )
* Hands on experience in **Java/J2EE/Sprintboot/MVC applications/Node JS**

 **Qualifications**

  

Sr. Consultant: 6\+ years of experience


Consultant: 3\+ years of experience


Professional Qualification \- B.E./B.Tech/MCA/MBA/MS

**Your role as a leader**

  

At Deloitte India, we believe in the importance of leadership at all levels. We expect our people to embrace and live our purpose by challenging themselves to identify issues that are most important for our clients, our people, and for society and make an impact that matters.

  

In addition to living our purpose, Sr.Consultant or Consultant across our organization:

* Ability to execute a project using Agile techniques to quickly deliver value for clients
* Ability to propose solutions by adopting a customer\-centric view of the client’s strategy
* Ability to combine digital acumen and a domain specialization to create solutions for our clients
* Ability to build and contribute domain thought\-ware for use by the network
* Ability to select appropriate methods for collecting and analyzing data, and develop informed recommendations that shape or support the client’s business strategy
* Ability to address client business challenges in the intersection of process and technology
* Ability to produce a high quality work product and collaborate with others to deliver a superior client experience
* Ability to deliver key messages with clarity, confidence and poise to instill confidence in clients
* Ability to incorporate financial information when evaluating strategic options
* Ability to apply a global and diverse perspective to problem solving
* Ability to understand how business functions operate and how sector trends impact a client’s business
* Ability to organize insights and define a logical flow to tell a story when presenting recommendations
* Builds relationships and communicates effectively in order to positively influence peers and other stakeholders
* Identifies and embraces our purpose and values and puts these into practice in their professional life
* Seeks opportunities to challenge self; teams with others across businesses and borders to deliver and takes accountability for own and team results
* Understands objectives for clients and Deloitte, aligns own work to objectives and sets personal priorities
* Develops self by actively seeking opportunities for growth, shares knowledge and experiences with others, and acts as a strong brand ambassador

 **How you’ll grow**

  

At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry\-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build world\-class skills in addition to hands\-on experience in the global, fast\-changing


business world. From on\-the\-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Centre.

 **Benefits**

  

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

 **Our purpose**

Deloitte is led by a purpose: *To make an impact that matters*.

  

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the

  

Communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change. Learn more about Deloitte's impact on the world

 **Recruiter tips**


We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: AVP – Head of India Tech Consulting & Strategic Deals
description:
Leading at Cognizant
  
This is a Leadership role at Cognizant. We believe how you lead is as important as what you deliver. Cognizant leaders at every level: Drive our business strategy and inspire teams around our future. Live the leadership behaviors , leading themselves, others and the business. Uphold our Values , role modeling them in every action and decision. Nurture our people and culture , creating a workplace where all can thrive.
  
At Cognizant, leadership transcends titles and is embodied in actions and behaviors. We empower our leaders at every level to drive business strategy, inspire teams, uphold our values, and foster an inclusive culture.
  
The Role
  
Cognizant helps companies modernize technology, reimagine processes and transform experiences so they stay ahead in a fast\-changing world.
  
Our Cognizant consulting group is looking for a Head of India Tech Consulting \& Strategic Deals to join our journey. We are looking for a deep tech person with strong experience in AI consulting, along with a multi\-industry experience in the Indian market; a person who has worked with top tier clients and has a strong network in the industry.
  
As a member of our team, you will be responsible for leading the India consulting arm of Cognizant and helping the company grow by managing top tier clients, striking strategic deals; while building a high performing team.
  
The Consulting Partner role is pivotal in driving strategic IT consulting initiatives within our organization. With a focus on delivering exceptional client solutions, the candidate will leverage their extensive experience to enhance business operations and foster innovation. This role requires a deep understanding of IT consulting, ensuring seamless integration of technology solutions to meet client needs and organizational goals.
  
**Every choice we make aligns to our vision:** to become the pre\-eminent technology services partner to the world’s top companies.
  
At Cognizant, we are a high\-performing team with heart. Our solutions are in demand and we’re passionate about making a difference. If you have experience with the above, you are a selfless leader and are committed to a client\-facing environment; if you want to grow your career with a team that wants to build something great together, we want to hear from you! Apply now!
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Lead the development and execution of IT consulting strategies that align with client objectives and organizational goals.
  
  

Oversee the implementation of technology solutions ensuring they meet client specifications and enhance business operations.
  
  

Provide expert guidance on IT consulting best practices fostering innovation and efficiency within client organizations.
  
  

Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to deliver comprehensive consulting services that drive business success.
  
  

Analyze client needs and develop tailored IT solutions that address specific challenges and opportunities.
  
  

Manage client relationships ensuring satisfaction and long\-term partnership through effective communication and service delivery.
  
  

Drive continuous improvement in consulting processes leveraging industry trends and insights to enhance service offerings.
  
  

Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations maintaining the highest level of professionalism and integrity.
  
  

Facilitate workshops and training sessions to empower client teams with the knowledge and skills needed for successful technology adoption.
  
  

Monitor project progress and performance providing regular updates to stakeholders and adjusting strategies as needed.
  
  

Utilize data analytics to assess the impact of consulting initiatives and identify areas for further optimization.
  
  

Support business development efforts by identifying new opportunities and contributing to proposal development.
  
  

Build, mentor, and inspire a high\-performing consulting team, fostering a culture of collaboration, innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.
  
  

Consistently demonstrate the Cognizant Way to Lead, which means operating with Personal Leadership (building trust, collaboration, and inclusion), Organizational Leadership (driving vision and purpose, demonstrating a strategic and enterprise mindset, and creating and communicating a bold direction that inspires purpose), and Business Leadership (exemplifying client focus, managing ambiguity with accountability and results, and operating with financial acumen).
  
  

**What you need to have to be considered:**  

20\+ years of experience working in IT consulting, AI \& deep tech; with a wide breadth of experience in multiple industries.
  
  

Possess extensive experience in IT consulting, demonstrating a deep understanding of Indian industry trends and client needs.
  
  

Have a proven track record of successful project management and client relationship building.
  
  

Exhibit strong analytical skills with the ability to develop and implement effective technology solutions.
  
  

Demonstrate excellent communication and interpersonal skills essential for managing client interactions and team collaboration.
  
  

Hold a relevant degree in IT business or a related field showcasing a solid educational foundation.
  
  

Show proficiency in data analytics tools and methodologies enhancing decision\-making and strategy development.
  
  

**Embodiment of the Cognizant Way to Lead:** Leading Self, Leading Others, \& Leading the Business.
  
  

**The embodiment of Cognizant’s Values of:** Work as One, Dare to Innovate, Raise the Bar, Do The right Thing, \& Own It.
  
  

**These will help you succeed:**  

Proficiency in AI, data analytics, and ability to foster insight\-led decision\-making to maximise the consulting impact
  
  

Experience managing small and large scale clients, facilitating client workshops, executive advisory sessions, and transformation roadmaps that accelerate technology adoption.
  
  

A commitment to continuous learning and professional development, with the ability to stay current on emerging technologies, industry trends, and consulting best practices.
  
  

**Work model:**  

Based on this role’s business requirements, the work model will be finalised once you join and may require working from a client or Cognizant office in India as needed. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for the role may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

description:

Location: Mumbai
Designation: Deputy Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Deputy Manager \| Accounting \& Reporting \| Mumbai \| Accounting \& Reporting Assurance**
  

* **Job requisition ID** : 103915
* **Location**: Mumbai
* **Entity**: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP

**The team**



Assurance is about much more than just the numbers. It’s about attesting to accomplishments and challenges, and helping to assure strong foundations for future aspirations. Deloitte illuminates the what, how, and why of change so you’re always ready to act ahead.

  


**Your work profile**

title: Oracle Cloud Supply Chain Senior Consultant
description:
**Oracle Cloud Supply Chain – Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations unlock value from enterprise technologies across supply chain, finance, manufacturing, and IT operations. As part of this team, you will work with clients to support large\-scale digital transformation by bringing together strategy, process design, and technology enablement. Deloitte’s practitioners combine industry knowledge with functional and technical experience to help organizations improve operations, enhance business performance, and navigate complex transformation journeys. Joining this team means collaborating with strategic advisors, solution architects, and delivery specialists focused on solving critical business challenges through Oracle Cloud\-enabled transformation.

**Level**: Senior Consultant or equivalent


As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions.

**Work you'll do**


As a Senior Consultant, Functional Transformation on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Supporting and optimizing Oracle Supply Chain Management modules, including Manufacturing, Procurement, Order Management, Inventory, Bill of Materials, and Costing
* Participating in Oracle Supply Chain Management full\-cycle implementations, including requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, functional design, configuration, and testing
* Collaborating with client stakeholders to identify business process improvement opportunities and translate requirements into solution designs
* Supporting end\-to\-end business processes, including Order to Cash and Procure to Pay, to help drive operational efficiency
* Working across delivery teams to support execution, issue resolution, and quality delivery in onsite\-offshore environments

**The team**


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 6\-10 years of experience supporting Oracle Supply Chain Management modules, including Manufacturing, Procurement, Order Management, Inventory, Bill of Materials, Work in Process, Advanced Pricing, Services, Advanced Supply Chain Planning, Demantra, and Costing
* 4\+ years of experience in Oracle Supply Chain Management full\-cycle implementations as a team member or lead
* Experience in requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, business process design, configuration, and testing
* Experience collaborating with clients on business process enhancements
* Experience supporting end\-to\-end Order to Cash and Procure to Pay cycles
* Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university

Preferred:

* Experience leading an Oracle applications workstream
* Experience working in onsite\-offshore delivery models
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
