title: Senior Manager - Field Marketing
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As a Senior Manager, Field Marketing within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will drive SEG's market presence through industry events, digital integrated campaigns, and ABM campaign coordination. Working in close partnership with Cognizant's ISL Field Marketing function, your focus will be on Service Line\-led event execution, end\-to\-end digital campaign delivery, and connecting SEG's content and subject matter experts into the broader field marketing engine.
  
You will bring together event management expertise and integrated digital campaign capability — spanning content, email, social, webinars, and roundtables — while coordinating closely with regional field marketing teams across EMEA, APJ, and Business Units to insert SEG into existing programmes rather than building parallel pipelines. This role carries a dotted\-line reporting relationship into the S. Director, Field, Service Line Marketing for field marketing activities, and works in coordination with the Director, Portfolio Marketing, SEG.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own Cognizant, industry, and partner event execution — including Service Line\-led and funded engagements such as industry conferences, partner summits, and association events where SEG clients are present.
  
Map the full face\-to\-face event universe for SEG's target buyers and build an annual event calendar with clear business development objectives for each activation.
  
Curate target attendee lists for events in alignment with Service Line strategy, and manage all event logistics including agency coordination, venue, invitations, speaker preparation, on\-site coordination, and post\-event follow\-up sequences in Winzone.
  
Connect SEG into regional field marketing teams across EMEA, APJ, and BUs — identifying where SEG content and SMEs can be integrated into existing programmes.
  
Identify and facilitate SEG SME participation in external events, coordinating speaker briefing and talking\-point preparation with the Associate Director.
  
Manage partner co\-marketing event activations with AWS, Azure, and AI platform partners, tracking joint event pipeline and MDF utilization.
  
Plan and execute digital integrated campaigns end\-to\-end — spanning thought leadership, content, email, social, webinars, and roundtables.
  
Operationalize the ABM account strategy set by the Portfolio \& Content AD — briefing the central Cognizant campaign team on account priorities, messaging angles, and content requirements, while tracking execution against plan.
  
Coordinate with the GTM AD on post\-event lead capture and CRM entry in Winzone, and report on field marketing contribution to pipeline in weekly leadership reviews.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
10–14 years of B2B field marketing, event marketing, or integrated campaign management experience within IT services or technology consulting.
  
MBA (Marketing) preferred.
  
Proven experience planning and executing B2B events at scale — from industry conferences to Service Line\-led roundtables and partner activations.
  
Hands\-on experience running digital integrated campaigns including email, content, social, and webinars in a B2B technology environment.
  
Comfortable working within a matrixed field marketing structure — experience integrating into centralized or regional field marketing functions is essential.
  
Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple simultaneous events and campaign workstreams across geographies and time zones.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience running ABM programmes or briefing central campaign teams on account\-level priorities.
  
Familiarity with hyper scaler partner co\-marketing ecosystems including AWS, Azure, and GCP events and MDF programmes.
  
Prior exposure to BFSI, HCLS, P\&R, or CMT vertical marketing.
  
Ability to self\-start, manage competing priorities, and thrive in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment.
  
**Event Impact:** Successful execution of Service Line\-led events with measurable business development outcomes and pipeline contribution.
  
**Campaign Performance:** Effective delivery of integrated digital campaigns that drive awareness, engagement, and qualified leads.
  
**Regional Integration:** Seamless insertion of SEG content and SMEs into existing EMEA, APJ, and BU field marketing programmes.
  
**Partner Activation:** Strong co\-marketing execution with strategic hyper scaler partners resulting in joint pipeline and MDF utilization.
  
**ABM Execution:** Accurate and timely briefing of central campaign teams, with clear tracking of account\-level programme performance.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, with a dotted\-line reporting relationship into the S. Director, Field, Service Line Marketing for field marketing activities. The role requires flexibility to coordinate across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: Coupa Consultant
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


We are seeking an experienced Coupa Consultant to support the implementation, configuration, and optimization of the Coupa Business Spend Management (BSM) platform. The role focuses on Procure\-to\-Pay (P2P), Sourcing, Contract Management, Supplier Management, and financial integrations to improve spend visibility and compliance.


* Configure and support Coupa modules including P2P, Invoicing, Expenses, Sourcing, Contracts, and Supplier Information Management
* Gather and analyze business requirements and translate them into Coupa solutions
* Configure approval chains, business rules, chart of accounts, suppliers, catalogs, and budgets
**Your Profile**
----------------


* Lead or support Coupa implementations, upgrades, and enhancements

title: ServiceNow TPRM - Senior Consultant
description:
**ServiceNow TPRM \- Senior Consultant**

**Enterprise Performance**


Deloitte’s Enterprise Performance practice helps organizations improve business outcomes through platform\-enabled transformation, technology modernization, and operational improvement. Within this space, our teams work across IT operations, service management, workflow automation, and enterprise platforms to deliver large\-scale digital transformation programs. As a ServiceNow Senior Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will work with cross\-functional teams to design, build, and enhance ServiceNow solutions that help clients streamline processes, improve service delivery, and create long\-term business value.

**Level**: Senior Consultant or equivalent


As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions.

**Work you'll do**


We are seeking a skilled **ServiceNow Third\-Party Risk Management (TPRM) Developer** to design, implement, and support ServiceNow TPRM solutions that strengthen vendor governance, risk visibility, due diligence, and ongoing monitoring. The ideal candidate combines functional knowledge of third\-party risk processes with hands\-on ServiceNow IRM / GRC platform expertise and can translate business requirements into scalable workflows, assessments, dashboards, and integrations.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Implement and configure ServiceNow TPRM / TPRP capabilities, including third\-party records, contacts, inherent risk questionnaires, due diligence workflows, issues, and remediation tracking
* Design and maintain risk assessments, scoring models, approval flows, questionnaires, and risk rating logic
* Integrate TPRM with broader IRM / GRC capabilities, vendor management processes, and CMDB where applicable
* Partner with Risk, Compliance, Procurement, Security, and business stakeholders to gather requirements and align workflows
* Build dashboards, reports, and monitoring views for third\-party risk status, compliance posture, assessment completion, and remediation progress
* Maintain documentation for solution design, configuration, workflows, and operating procedures
* Support continuous improvement of third\-party onboarding, reassessment, escalation, and offboarding processes

**Required Qualifications**

* 6\-10 years hands\-on experience with the ServiceNow platform and strong exposure to TPRM, IRM, or GRC modules
* Solid understanding of third\-party risk, vendor risk, compliance processes, control frameworks, and risk scoring methodologies
* Experience with ServiceNow configuration and development, including workflows, Business Rules, reporting, dashboards, and preferably JavaScript
* Experience integrating ServiceNow with external vendor, risk, or enterprise platforms using APIs and standard web services
* Strong analytical, troubleshooting, communication, and stakeholder management skills

**Preferred Qualifications**

* ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA)
* ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – Third\-Party Risk Management (CIS\-TPRM)
* ServiceNow CIS in GRC / IRM for broader integrated risk roles
* Industry certifications such as CRISC, CISM, or privacy/risk credentials
* Experience in regulated industries such as financial services, healthcare, or critical infrastructure

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 including night shift as per business requirements


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Head of Operations
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**Role: Head of Operations, MACS India – Marketing \& Creative Services**


**Location: Mumbai, India**

**Grade: D1/D2**


Based in Mumbai, India, the *Head of Operations*, *MACS* will serve as a pivotal role to drive operations for Capgemini Business Services Marketing Operations unit and full stack global marketing services agency, MACS (Marketing \& Creative Services). The role is a key hire at an opportune time when MACS is undergoing an organization\- wide transformation in building new capability, processes, and talent towards a new vision.


MACS is a large global operation of more than 300 marcomm professionals in India and Poland, providing a multitude of services across streams such as marketing, communications, digital, analytics, martech and creative services to the Marketing \& Communications functions of Capgemini. As MACS looks for growth and expansion in its operations, the Head Operations, in India, will be responsible to oversee operational excellence, revenue and budget management, change management and drive various transformation initiatives spanning a large team of 270 people in MACS India.


**Job Role**
------------


**Role**


As the Head of Operations \- MACS, you would have a broad view of all aspects of the MACS delivery operations across streams, and geographies globally, operating out of India. You would be responsible to lead operations of a large marcomm services unit to build in efficiency in delivery operations, key priorities, introduce new processes in hiring/talent demand forecasting, introduce work\-flow automation, project feedback, employee engagement attrition, management reporting on an on\-going basis.


* As a lead for MACS Operations, you will be a partner to Global MACS lead and work alongside MACS IN delivery leader, and service delivery leads from across streams on ensuring efficient, timely, delivery operations and governance.
* You will be responsible for managing escalation on all operations and be a single point of contact for all internal operations in MACS India.

You will also be responsible for setting the agenda for operations transformation in MACS – interfacing with delivery teams, finance teams, audit and compliance, governance, employee engagement activities.


**Job Responsibilities**
------------------------


* **Manage and bring in efficient operational change through new processes, dashboards and team communication**

Support the MACS Global Lead on managing all operations. Bring in an overview of all key delivery projects across streams and progress on timely delivery on the same. You’ll be responsible for delivery Operations reporting (Management Reviews, Reporting, Invoicing, SLA/KPI tracking etc.).


* **Financial management, audits**

You will be managing along with the MACS Global Lead, all inputs required for MACS financial overview and targets (budget management, revenue management, competitiveness, utilization metrics) for resources in MACS India. You will be responsible for financial tracking and reporting with the finance team. You will also manage various management reporting requirements, like reviews, audits etc.


* **Manage talent forecast, recruitment, HR liaison**

You will be responsible for driving and optimizing the recruitment process and dashboards and you will work with the MACS Leads (Design, Digital \& Content, Comms, Marketing, ABM \& Pursuits) to identify recruitment needs and be with locate the single point of contact with HR and the practice team in the recruitment process for all key hires. You will also manage the resource pipeline running efficiently. Work on a process for performance and rewards management.


* **Drive Process improvement \| SLA tracking \| Tools procurement**

You will be reporting to MACS Global Lead in driving key initiatives of the MACS transformation that bring in better productivity, and efficiency in delivery operations. responsible in driving key initiatives to improve MACS processes including project management, automation adoption, talent onboarding, and people management that are a part of the MACS transformation.


**Responsibilities**
--------------------


* **Stakeholder escalation management** You will support MACS IN delivery Lead in ensuring appropriate, proactive communication with key stakeholders including overviewing arrangement of meetings and visits and ensuring timely delivery of periodically requested information. You will be leading all management reviews on MACS with Bsv leadership.
* **Employee experience management** Build and implement an outstanding onboarding and employee experience. With 200\+ people, we need a consistent and reassuring onboarding experience that provides new joiners with an onboarding experience that makes them feel comfortable and inspires them to be the best at their job that they can be. Work on building new team culture, rituals, by organizing workshops, learning sessions, events and quick ‘pick me ups’, and to flag any issues that you feel might be affecting team morale
* **Coordinate the team management agenda and activities**. You’ll be part of the team’s senior management and will be responsible for creating and driving the agenda and liaising with the local organization on matters such as facilities (e.g., space allowance).
* **Business community and risk management:** Be responsible for all Bsv actions on managing crisis, risk, and business continuity processes.
* **Be responsible for knowledge management and internal comms**. As our team grows, it’s become harder to keep people up to date with developments such as new joiners, impact of global business results on our team, key projects, new processes, deadlines, etc. Your role will be to ensure that the team is informed of all relevant developments, and that they’re clear and well understood within the team.
* **MACS Onboarding \& new processes \- help craft, document and implement processes.** Work with Stream Leads to refine processes around creative work, then support the documentation and dissemination of these processes across the local and global team and provide support for those people using the processes for the first time.
* **Analyze tools and team documentation** as a team, we use a suite of tools aimed at meeting a number of needs, such as productivity, transparency, reporting and collaboration. We’ll look to you to evaluate these tools on an ongoing basis, and form opinions about which tools to use based on your well\-rounded knowledge of all the different stakeholder needs.
* **Build up and maintain a database of trusted vendors.** Sometimes, we don’t have capacity to take on work ourselves, or we don’t have the right skillset to provide a specific service, but we know a man, woman or company that can. You and/or your team will be responsible for building out and maintaining a list of trusted service providers (e.g. film crews, photographers, voiceover artists, etc.) that can be used by our team or shared with our stakeholders.
**Experience/Skill requirements**
---------------------------------


* 12\+ years of overall industry experience driving revenue, cost, service operations as for a large organization focused on Marketing delivery Operations
* Minimum 5\+ years of leadership in marketing and communications operations and experienced in managing operations of large teams
* **Preference to operations leadership experience in marcomm function, or marketing operations lead in marketing services organization, or the business head in a digital/creative agency**
* Experienced in roles that involve multiple stakeholders, in complex environments, people management activities
* Experienced in optimizing operations, processes, and delivery in dynamic environments
* **Preference for experience in transformational projects,** continuous learner, problem solving mindset. Shows interest in new developments; is willing to learn; remains open to new ideas and thinking.
* Strong process management skills and certification
* Sound understanding of finance, cost structure, P\&L management
* Strong client facing experience, stakeholder management

Assertive and able to drive change, excellent communication skills

description:
**Short Description**
---------------------


Join a team working on next\-generation automotive embedded systems. As an AUTOSAR BSW Engineer, you will contribute to the development and integration of critical Basic Software modules, enabling reliable and high\-performance communication and diagnostics across automotive platforms.


**Your Role**


You will be responsible for designing, developing, and integrating AUTOSAR Basic Software components, ensuring seamless communication, diagnostics, and memory management across ECU systems. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to deliver robust and scalable embedded solutions.


**Location:** Bangalore / Chennai
  

**Experience:** 6–12 years


**In this role, you will:**


* Develop and integrate AUTOSAR Basic Software (BSW) communication modules, including Ethernet, SOME/IP, J1939, and CAN FD.
* Design and implement AUTOSAR BSW diagnostic functionalities, including fault handling and failure management mechanisms.
* Develop and optimize Non\-Volatile Memory (NvM) modules for efficient data storage and retrieval.
* Perform debugging, validation, and integration of BSW components to ensure system stability and performance.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to support system integration and issue resolution.
* Contribute to system architecture discussions and continuous improvement initiatives.

**Your Profile**


* Strong experience in AUTOSAR BSW development and integration.
* Hands\-on expertise in automotive communication protocols such as CAN, CAN FD, Ethernet, SOME/IP, and J1939\.
* Experience in diagnostics, fault handling, and failure management mechanisms.
* Good understanding of embedded systems and automotive software development lifecycle.
* Strong debugging and problem\-solving skills.

title: Successfactor Specialist- Assistant Manager- Hyderabad
description:
Deloitte is seeking a SuccessFactors specialist to support SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll within the SuccessFactors team. This role supports day\-to\-day operations, issue resolution, system enhancements, and payroll compliance activities across HR and payroll processes. The role also works with cross\-functional stakeholders to improve system stability, accuracy, and operational efficiency.

**Work you'll do**


As a SuccessFactors specialist on the SuccessFactors team, you will be responsible for:

* Manage access requests, incidents, and change requests for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues across core HR processes, payroll schema, payroll rules, and payroll processing activities.
* Configure and maintain foundation objects, MDF objects, workflows, business rules, event reasons, employee lifecycle processes, and Payroll Control Center components.
* Support integrations, interfaces, Point\-to\-Point replication, support package application, and country legal changes to maintain system stability and payroll compliance.
* Coordinate impact assessments, root cause analysis, testing, release activities, year\-end processing, tax reporting, reconciliation, and audit support.
* Develop standard operating procedures, support documentation, and knowledge articles while partnering with HR, Payroll, Security, Integration, and technical teams on continuous improvement initiatives.

**The team**


The SuccessFactors team supports SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll to help deliver stable, compliant, and efficient HR and payroll operations. The team works closely with HR, Payroll, Integration, Security, and technical stakeholders to resolve issues, implement enhancements, and improve end\-to\-end employee processes. This team also supports ongoing transformation by strengthening controls, improving user experience, and maintaining operational reliability across HR systems.

**Location: Hyderabad**

**Shift Timings: 06:30 AM to 03:30 PM**

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 7\+ years of experience with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll.
* Experience configuring foundation objects, MDF objects, workflows, business rules, data models, and employee lifecycle processes in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central.
* Experience supporting payroll schema, payroll rules, payroll operations, tax processes, statutory activities, and year\-end payroll activities.
* Experience managing access requests, incidents, and change requests in an HRIS or payroll support environment.
* Experience supporting integrations, interfaces, data replication, and Point\-to\-Point replication between Employee Central and Employee Central Payroll.
* Experience configuring Payroll Control Center, off\-cycle payroll, garnishments, and payroll reporting processes.
* Experience creating standard operating procedures, support documentation, and knowledge articles.


Preferred:

* Experience with ABAP debugging.
* Experience applying HR Support Packages, Human Resources Support Packages, and Country Legal Changes.
* Experience with role\-based permissions and position management in SAP SuccessFactors.
* Experience coordinating testing, defect resolution, and release management for HR technology enhancements.
* Experience supporting payroll transformation or process optimization initiatives.
* Experience working with HR, Payroll, Security, Integration, and technical teams.

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.

title: ServiceNow CSM - Consultant
description:
**ServiceNow** **CSM** **\- Consultant**

**Enterprise Performance**


Deloitte’s Enterprise Performance practice helps organizations improve business outcomes through platform\-enabled transformation, technology modernization, and operational improvement. Within this space, our teams work across IT operations, service management, workflow automation, and enterprise platforms to deliver large\-scale digital transformation programs. As a ServiceNow Senior Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will work with cross\-functional teams to design, build, and enhance ServiceNow solutions that help clients streamline processes, improve service delivery, and create long\-term business value.

**Level**: Consultant or equivalent


As a Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions.

**Work you'll do**


We are seeking a skilled **ServiceNow Customer Service Management (CSM) Consultant / Developer** to design, implement, and support ServiceNow CSM solutions that improve customer operations, case management, and service delivery. The ideal candidate combines a functional understanding of customer service processes with hands\-on ServiceNow development experience and can translate business requirements into scalable platform solutions.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Gather, analyze, and document business requirements for ServiceNow CSM implementations and enhancements
* Design, configure, and customize CSM capabilities including Case Management, Agent Workspace, Account and Contact Management, Entitlements, Service Contracts, and customer\-facing portal experiences
* Build and automate workflows using Flow Designer, Business Rules, Client Scripts, UI Policies, UI Actions, and Script Includes
* Develop server\-side and client\-side scripts using JavaScript and Glide API for custom CSM applications and enhancements
* Design and build integrations with CRM, ERP, ticketing, and other third\-party systems using REST, SOAP, IntegrationHub, Web Services, and MID Server
* Provide technical guidance on ServiceNow best practices, scalable design, and minimizing technical debt
* Conduct client demos, workshops, training sessions, and support UAT activities
* Perform code reviews, troubleshoot issues, support upgrades, and maintain technical documentation

**Required Qualifications**

* 3\-6 years of ServiceNow development experience in large enterprise environments
* Hands\-on experience with the ServiceNow platform and CSM module implementation or support
* Strong knowledge of ServiceNow platform fundamentals including forms, tables, lists, ACLs, and configuration
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript, Glide scripting, HTML/CSS, and ServiceNow development concepts
* Experience with CSM data models, case lifecycle management, workflows, and portal capabilities
* Experience with REST/SOAP APIs and enterprise integrations
* Working knowledge of ITIL practices and ServiceNow\-aligned service management processes
* Strong communication, analytical, and problem\-solving skills, with the ability to explain technical solutions in business terms

**Preferred Qualifications**

* ServiceNow Certified System Administrator (CSA)
* ServiceNow Certified Application Developer (CAD)
* ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – Customer Service Management (CIS\-CSM)
* ITIL V3 or ITIL 4 certification

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 including night shift as per business requirements


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. **The team**



We offer a wide range of services, with projects tailored to a client's individual needs. We provide dedicated support throughout the deal / transaction lifecycle from initial evaluation through the post\-merger integration. We work across numerous industries and markets.



. Learn more about Strategy \& Transactions  


**Your work profile**


* As a Deputy Manager in the FDD Team you’ll build and nurture positive working relationships with teams and clients with the intention to exceed client expectations: \-
* Quickly developing an understanding of the target business and its drivers
* Interpretation, evaluation and analysis of information memoranda, business plans, publicly available information on the target business
* Production of quality deliverables (including Excel and Powerpoint documents) within agreed timescales, briefing Partner/Director/Senior Manager/Manager accordingly. On larger deals this may involve responsibility for the production of discrete sections. This will include:
	+ Review and analysis of historical trading, cash flow and balance sheets
	+ Review and analysis of projections, and underlying assumptions
	+ Reporting of potential key issues for our client including identification of risk or price affecting consideration
	+ Work on a variety of transactions in a variety of industries from IPO's to large cross border acquisitions
	+ Be part of cross border teams from 2 to 10 on engagements lasting from just a few days to several months
	+ Assist clients from large multinationals, private equity houses to owner managed businesses
	+ Longer term, potential opportunities for international secondment

**Key skills required**

* CA qualified (ideally first\-time passes) or equivalent qualification with 3 to 5 years of experience
* Transaction experience/exposure would be an advantage.
* Strong report writing and reviewing skills, attention to detail, conciseness and risk management
* Strong excel skills \- quick and accurate manipulation of data
* Strong commercial acumen and market awareness
* Focused on high quality service \& fluency in written \& verbal English

title: Associate Director - Portfolio & Content Marketing
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As an Associate Director, Portfolio \& Content Marketing within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will serve as the strategic messaging anchor for one of Cognizant's most dynamic and fast\-growing service line groups. You will own the end\-to\-end content and positioning strategy across SEG's full offering portfolio — spanning AI\-led Software Engineering, IT Modernization, IT Operations, and AI Assurance — ensuring consistent, compelling narratives that resonate with C\-suite and enterprise buyers globally.
  
You will act as a trusted strategic partner to the SEG Marketing leadership, driving messaging excellence, competitive differentiation, and thought leadership across all buyer\-facing channels, while overseeing content quality and consistency across the team.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own and maintain the messaging architecture across all SEG offerings, developing a comprehensive messaging matrix per offering — aligned by buyer persona, vertical, and pain point.
  
Drive content strategy, creation, and quality, acting as a strategic partner to the Director, Service Line Marketing Leader on SEG's positioning and narrative.
  
Define ABM account strategy — including account selection, tiering, and messaging angles — and brief Cognizant's central campaign structure for execution.
  
Oversee the output of the Executive Communications \& Social function, ensuring consistency and quality across all external\-facing content.
  
Prepare analyst briefing materials for Gartner, Forrester, and IDC, and lead competitive differentiation work including quarterly battlecard updates.
  
Commission and review thought leadership content — including PoV articles, solution narratives, white papers, and industry perspectives — in collaboration with SEG SMEs and external writers.
  
Maintain market and competitive intelligence on technology shifts and evolving client adoption patterns to continuously refresh SEG's narrative.
  
Partner with the GTM Associate Director to ensure all sales enablement materials reflect current positioning before distribution to the sales community.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
12\+ years of product marketing or portfolio marketing experience within IT services or technology consulting.
  
MBA (Marketing/IT) and Engineering degree preferred.
  
Demonstrated ability to build and own messaging frameworks for complex, multi\-offering technology services portfolios.
  
Exceptional written English with a strong ability to review, edit, and elevate C\-suite\-level content; a published portfolio of B2B thought leadership is strongly preferred.
  
Experience preparing analyst briefing materials and competitive intelligence decks for technology services.
  
Proven ability to partner with senior SMEs and offering leaders to translate insights into compelling business narratives.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience with ABM program design — account selection, tiering, and content mapping.
  
Familiarity with AI, Cloud, Data Engineering, or ERP services marketing.
  
Prior exposure to BFSI, HCLS, P\&R, or CMT vertical marketing.
  
Ability to manage multiple priorities and thrive in a complex, matrixed, cross\-functional environment.
  
Strategic agility to navigate dynamic business contexts and evolving portfolio landscapes.
  
**Messaging Impact:** A clear, consistent, and differentiated narrative across all SEG offerings and buyer touchpoints.
  
**Content Excellence:** High\-quality thought leadership and sales enablement assets that drive engagement and pipeline.
  
**Competitive Positioning:** Up\-to\-date battlecards and analyst materials that strengthen SEG's market differentiation.
  
**Stakeholder Satisfaction:** Positive feedback from SEG leadership, sales, and GTM teams on content quality and strategic alignment.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, requiring regular in\-office presence and flexibility across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role

title: Capital Projects GCC Leader
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


The Capital Projects GCC Leader will drive the presales strategy for large capital projects across Energy \& Utilities, leading opportunity shaping, qualification, and full pursuit lifecycle management. They will mentor and scale an India based SME/ pre\-sales team, enhancing solutioning, proposal development, and storytelling capabilities. The role requires building strong C\-suite relationships to shape early\-stage demand and position the organisation as a strategic transformation partner. The leader will develop differentiated value propositions, orchestrate cross global teams for competitive bids, and steer governance across major pursuits. They will also represent the organisation in key industry forums to strengthen thought leadership and market visibility. Key Responsibilities
* Lead pre\-sales strategy for the capital\-projects portfolio across Energy \& Utilities, driving opportunity shaping, qualification, and high\-quality pursuit execution.
* Set\-up, lead and mentor the India\-based sales team, strengthening solutioning, proposal development, and storytelling capabilities.
* Drive full pursuit lifecycle\- from opportunity identification to RFP response, solution orchestration, orals preparation, BAFO, and contract negotiation.
* Develop C\-suite level relationships across utilities, power, nuclear, and infrastructure clients shaping early\-stage demand and positioning the organisation as a strategic transformation partner.
* Develop differentiated value propositions combining engineering services, digital/AI\-enabled delivery, and scalable global\-delivery constructs.
* Chair pursuit governance (war rooms, solution reviews, win strategy workshops) and ensure commercial, legal, and technical alignment for all large deals.
* Partner with global teams (delivery, solution architecture, pricing, finance, ER\&D, Invent) to craft compelling, competitive, and defensible bid responses.
* Drive creating repeatable sales\-enablement assets (playbooks, benchmarks, competitive insights), while ensuring clear synergy with the GCC India sales engine.
* Represent the organisation, from Capital Projects stand\-point at major industry forums, driving thought leadership and enhancing market visibility.

**Primary Skills**
------------------


* 20\+ years of experience in Energy \& Utilities sales, capital project solutions, engineering services, infrastructure programmes, or EPC/EPCM advisory.
* Demonstrated success closing large, multi\-million\-dollar capital project or engineering deals.
* Strong CXO level network across utilities, energy networks, water companies, transmission/distribution, or infrastructure agencies.
* Proven experience in running high performing sales teams or setting up GCC/GBS sales/solutioning organizations.
* Track record of leading complex global RFPs, orals, negotiations, and competitive bid cycles.
* Strong understanding of project controls, engineering workflows, digital/AI enabled project models, and capital project operating frameworks.
* Exceptional communication, and executive presence.

title: Oracle Cloud Technical Consultant
description:
**Oracle Cloud Technical \- Consultant, Managed Services**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations maximize value from enterprise technologies across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations. As a Cloud Technical Consultant within Managed Services, you will support clients in maintaining, enhancing, and optimizing cloud\-based solutions that enable business performance and operational continuity. Deloitte’s practitioners bring together technology experience, process knowledge, and delivery discipline to help organizations address complex operational needs, improve system performance, and support ongoing transformation in a dynamic business environment.

**Level**: Consultant or equivalent


As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

**Work you'll do**


As a Consultant, Managed Services on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Supporting Oracle Cloud technical operations across managed services engagements, including issue analysis, defect resolution, and system enhancements
* Developing and maintaining reports, interfaces, extensions, and data conversion components using SQL, BI Publisher, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting Studio, and File\-Based Data Import templates
* Supporting integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud, Service\-Oriented Architecture, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, and Web Services Description Language\-based services
* Performing production support activities, including queue monitoring, ticket updates, incident and problem management, and resolution within service\-level requirements
* Collaborating with functional, technical, onsite, and offshore teams to support deployments, code migration, testing, and ongoing system improvements

**The team**


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 3\-6 years of experience in Oracle Cloud technical implementation, support, or managed services
* Experience developing conversions, interfaces, and reports using SQL, BI Publisher, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting Studio, and File\-Based Data Import templates
* Experience supporting 3\-4 Oracle Cloud modules, including navigation, tables, and end\-to\-end process flows
* Experience developing or supporting integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud, Service\-Oriented Architecture, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, or Web Services Description Language
* Experience with BI Publisher reports, Enterprise Scheduler Service jobs, and data conversions using File\-Based Data Import templates
* Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, problem, and enhancement management
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering, computer science, or business

Preferred:

* Experience delivering 2\-3 integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud or Service\-Oriented Architecture
* Experience with production support activities, including queue monitoring, ticket tracking, and service\-level agreement\-based resolution
* Experience applying cloud integration patterns in Oracle Cloud environments
* Experience with business intelligence security roles
* Experience with code migration, code reviews, naming standards, and technical quality practices
* Experience with performance tuning and SQL optimization
  

  

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: GSA Solution Architect
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
  

Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth.
  
  

At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
  

About The Role
  
  

As a Deal Solution Architect , you will play a critical role in driving digital transformation for our clients in India. You will be responsible for architecting winning solutions for large and medium sized deals (USD 25 to 50 million) in both the private and public sectors. This role requires a deep understanding of various technologies, strong collaboration skills, and the ability to navigate complex RFP processes.
  
  

As a key member of the team, you will collaborate closely with technical experts, delivery partners, commercial teams, legal, finance, contract management teams, and customer stakeholders to develop compelling and competitive solutions. You will have the opportunity to influence strategic deal pursuits, optimize technical and commercial outcomes, and contribute to business growth while working in a dynamic and fast\-paced environment.
  
  

In This Role, You Will
  
  

Analyze RFPs and lead QandA sessions with customers alongside technical experts.
  
Develop compelling and competitive solutions that align with organizational guidelines and leverage best practices.
  
Collaborate effectively with multiple technical teams delivery partners commercial legal finance and contract management teams.
  
Manage solution versions integrate components from various technical towers and ensure a cohesive final response.
  
Optimize estimations technical solutions and project costs.
  
Own the final solution response and ensure its completeness.
  
Share effort and cost details with finance for commercial solution development.
  
Support the commercial team in deal negotiations and auctions.
  
Assist legal contract and delivery teams in drafting Statements of Work (SOWs).
  
Communicate deal summaries to leadership and present solutions to internal review boards.
  
Defend solutions with customers and manage risks associated with the solution development process.
  
Model SLA penalties and analyze commercial risks.
  
Design RACI matrices across internal teams partners and customers.
  
Report deal unit economics and benchmark against organizational guidelines.
  
Embrace our vibrant culture by striving for excellence, focusing on meaningful outcomes, and collaborating effectively. Take ownership, build relationships, and focus on personal growth to drive business strategy and foster an inclusive culture, creating unmatched career opportunities and impactful work.
  
  

What You Must Have To Be Considered
  
  

Proven experience in architecting solutions for large scale digital transformation projects.
  
Strong understanding of ERP implementations and other platform\-based solutions (e.g. SAP RISE Salesforce ServiceNow).
  
Experience with multi tower multi\-year IT outsourcing engagements.
  
Familiarity with hybrid cloud architectures ( VPC Network Connectivity DC DR Compute \& Storage types Security ) modern data architectures and observability concepts.
  
Understanding of API management cybersecurity principles and agile methodologies.
  
Knowledge of different commercial models (effort\-based task catalog outcome based etc.).
  
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  
Ability to work calmly under pressure and manage competing priorities.
  
Proficiency in Office 365 especially MS Excel.
  
Experience with Low\-Code No\-Code platforms.
  
Knowledge of bot\-based solutions and automation in software engineering or application support.
  
Familiarity with Generative AI and its application in automating daily work.
  
TOGAF
  
A strong sense of ownership, desire to create meaningful outcomes, and passion for work that serves a greater good for customers, communities, or global challenges.
  
**The embodiment of Cognizant’s Values of:** Work as One, Dare to Innovate, Raise the Bar, Do The Right Thing, \& Own It.
  
  

These Will Help You Succeed
  
  

Strong stakeholder management and collaboration skills across technical, commercial, and business teams.
  
Ability to manage complex deal pursuits with multiple workstreams and dependencies.
  
Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities.
  
Experience presenting solutions to leadership teams and governance boards.
  
Ability to balance technical, commercial, and contractual considerations while designing solutions.
  
Strong negotiation support and risk management capabilities.

title: Appium Testing
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


Join our Quality Engineering team to drive mobile test automation and quality assurance initiatives across Android and iOS platforms. As an Appium Automation Engineer, you will design, develop, and maintain scalable automation frameworks while ensuring high\-quality software delivery through functional, UI, and API testing.


**Your Profile**
----------------


* Overall **7\+ years of IT experience**.
* **4\+ years of hands\-on experience in Mobile Automation Testing** (Android and iOS).
* Strong expertise in **Appium, Selenium, and Java**.
* Experience in **API Testing** using tools/frameworks such as Postman, Rest Assured, or equivalent.
* Strong understanding of automation framework design and implementation:
* + Hybrid Framework
	+ Data\-Driven Framework
	+ Keyword\-Driven Framework
	+ Behavior\-Driven Development (BDD)
* Good understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), STLC, test methodologies, and quality assurance processes.
* Experience in test planning, execution, defect tracking, and reporting.
* Strong debugging, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

**Preferred Skills:**


* Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, Azure DevOps, or GitHub Actions.
* Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies.
* Experience with cloud\-based mobile testing platforms (BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, etc.).
* Exposure to version control tools such as Git.
**In This Role, You Will**
--------------------------


* Design, develop, and execute automated test scripts for mobile applications (Android and iOS) using Appium and Selenium.
* Build and enhance automation frameworks including Hybrid, Data\-Driven, Keyword\-Driven, and Behavior\-Driven frameworks.
* Perform functional, UI, regression, integration, and API testing.
* Create and maintain reusable automation components and testing utilities.
* Develop tooling across the testing lifecycle, including test case management, test data generation, automated defect capture, and test reporting.
* Estimate, prioritize, plan, and coordinate testing activities across releases.
* Analyze test results, identify quality risks, and work closely with development teams for defect resolution.
* Integrate automation suites with CI/CD pipelines and quality reporting tools.
* Ensure adherence to SDLC processes, quality standards, and testing best practices.
**What You'll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work on enterprise\-scale mobile automation initiatives.
* Exposure to modern test automation frameworks and DevOps practices.
* Collaborative and innovation\-driven engineering culture.
* Continuous learning and career growth opportunities.
* Flexible and dynamic work environment with global team collaboration.
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

title: TL-US Banking Check/Item Processing Implementation
description:
**Job title:** Team Lead – US Banking Check/ Item Processing Implementation
  
About the role
  
As a SME/Team Lead/Manager \- US Banking Check/ Item Processing Implementation,, you will make an impact by delivering implementation solutions across card and payments processing environments with a focus on US banking. You will be a valued member of the Cards \& Payments team and work collaboratively with clients, technical teams, and stakeholders to drive successful project outcomes and client satisfaction.
  
In this role, you will
  
* Lead and execute implementation activities across cards and payments solutions, ensuring alignment with client requirements and business objectives


Manage end\-to\-end implementation of item and image processing across merchant, mobile, teller, and ATM capture channels
  
Drive solutioning for Image Cash Letter processing, including duplicate detection configuration and exception handling
  
Collaborate with clients during US business hours to gather requirements, deliver training, and support go\-live and stabilization phases
  
Analyze data, identify risks or patterns, and proactively resolve issues while managing escalations and stakeholder communication
  
Work model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. Based on this role’s business requirements, this is a hybrid position requiring 2\-3 days a week in a client or Cognizant office in PUNE / BANGALORE / CHENNAI/HYD/Kolkata/Ahmedabad India. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting. This may change based on the project you’re engaged in, as well as business and client requirements. Rest assured; we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
What you need to have to be considered
  
* 5\-15 years of experience in US banking cards and payments domain


Strong knowledge of item and image processing, including merchant and mobile distributed capture workflows
  
Experience with Image Cash Letter processing and duplicate detection configuration and management
  
Understanding of deposit lifecycle, settlement, balancing, and exception handling across distributed capture platforms
  
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent qualification
  
These will help you stand out
  
* Familiarity with banking ERP, check clearing, and remittance processing environments


Knowledge of print and mail processing fundamentals, composition, and output tooling
  
Experience with file intake, data validation, and print floor or insertion processing capabilities
  
Basic knowledge of SQL and Oracle
  
Strong communication, stakeholder management, and client\-facing skills
  
Inclusive encouragement
  
We’re excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don’t hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: Analyst | Digital | Pune | Operations, Industry & Domain Solutions
description:
Job requisition ID :: 105456
Date: Jul 10, 2026
Location: Pune
Designation: Analyst
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Role Overview**


We are seeking a skilled L2 Support Engineer with 3–5 years of experience to provide advanced technical support for critical applications and systems. The role involves resolving escalated issues from L1, working with SQL for data analysis and troubleshooting, and collaborating with cross\-functional teams to ensure seamless operations and high service availability.

 **Key Responsibilities**

* Handle escalated tickets from L1 support and ensure timely resolution within defined SLAs.
* Troubleshoot and resolve application, system, and database\-related issues.
* Use SQL queries to analyze data, identify root causes, and provide fixes or workarounds.
* Collaborate with development, infrastructure, and database teams for issue resolution and preventive measures.
* Document solutions, create knowledge base articles, and mentor L1 teams where necessary.
* Participate in incident, problem, and change management processes.
* Support scheduled deployments, patches, and configuration updates.
* Perform root cause analysis (RCA) and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives.

 **Required Skills \& Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
* 3–5 years of experience in L2/Application Support roles.
* Strong SQL knowledge (queries, joins, troubleshooting).
* Hands\-on experience with ticketing systems (Redmine, ServiceNow, JIRA, etc.).
* Good understanding of Windows/Linux operating environments.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Willingness to work in shifts and provide on\-call support if required.

 **Good to Have (Optional)**

* Knowledge of ASP.Net Web Forms, C\#, and Java for application\-level troubleshooting.
* Scripting experience (PowerShell, Python, or Shell scripting).
* Familiarity with monitoring/logging tools (Splunk, Dynatrace, AppDynamics, etc.).
* ITIL Foundation certification or knowledge of ITIL processes.

title: C++ ADAS Developer
description:
Join a team working on advanced automotive safety systems and contribute to building next\-generation ADAS features. In this role, you will leverage your strong C\+\+ expertise and domain knowledge to develop intelligent, reliable, and safety\-compliant driving solutions.


**Your Role**
-------------


As an ADAS C\+\+ Developer, you will design, develop, and optimize ADAS functionalities aligned with global safety standards. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to implement predictive and behavioral models for advanced driving systems.


**Location:** Bangalore
  

**Experience:** 6–12 years


**Your Profile**
----------------


**Mandatory Skills:**


* Strong hands\-on experience in C\+\+ (C\+\+11 or above) for ADAS development.
* Proven experience in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS).
* Good understanding of ADAS standards:
* + NCAP
	+ ISO 26262
	+ UNECE Regulations (R79, R152, R157\)
* Experience with behavior modeling functions including:
* + Behavior prediction
	+ Potential object selection
	+ Predictive modeling
	+ Criticality assessment
* Strong expertise in advanced C\+\+ concepts:
* + Templates and template\-based inheritance
	+ STL and containers
	+ Lambda functions
	+ Exception handling
	+ Memory management
	+ Data structures and algorithms
* Hands\-on experience in Python scripting.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills.
* Ability to work independently in a fast\-paced environment.

**Added Advantage:**


* Experience with SCM tools such as GitHub.
* Hands\-on experience with unit testing frameworks like Google Test (gTest).
* Familiarity with Atlassian tools (JIRA, Bitbucket).
* Exposure to MATLAB scripting.
* Understanding of software design patterns.
**In this role, you will**
--------------------------


* Develop and enhance ADAS features using C\+\+ (C\+\+11 and above).
* Implement behavior model functions including prediction, object selection, and criticality assessment.
* Design and develop predictive models for real\-time decision\-making.
* Ensure compliance with ADAS standards such as NCAP, ISO 26262, and UNECE regulations (R79, R152, R157\).
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams for integration, validation, and optimization.
* Optimize performance, reliability, and scalability of ADAS solutions.
* Utilize Python scripting for automation and data processing.
* Participate in debugging, code reviews, and continuous improvement activities.
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

**Job Title:** BUSINESS ANALYST L4

**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The purpose of the role is to liaison and bridging the gap between customer and Wipro delivery team to comprehend and analyze customer requirements and articulating aptly to delivery teams thereby, ensuring right solutioning to the customer.
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

1\. Customer requirements gathering and engagement
  
  

Interface and coordinate with client engagement partners to understand the RFP/ RFI requirements
  
Detail out scope documents, functional \& non\-functional requirements, features etc ensuring all stated and unstated customer needs are captured
  
Construct workflow charts and diagrams, studying system capabilities, writing specification after thorough research and analysis of customer requirements
  
Engage and interact with internal team \- project managers, pre\-sales team, tech leads, architects to design and formulate accurate and timely response to RFP/RFIs
  
Understand and communicate the financial and operational impact of any changes
  
Periodic cadence with customers to seek clarifications and feedback wrt solution proposed for a particular RFP/ RFI and accordingly instructing delivery team to make changes in the design
  
Empower the customers through demonstration and presentation of the proposed solution/ prototype
  
Maintain relationships with customers to optimize business integration and lead generation
  
Ensure ongoing reviews and feedback from customers to improve and deliver better value (services/ products) to the customers
  
͏
  
  

2\. Engage with delivery team to ensure right solution is proposed to the customer
  
  

**a. Periodic cadence with delivery team to:**  

Provide them with customer feedback/ inputs on the proposed solution
  
Review the test cases to check 100% coverage of customer requirements
  
Conduct root cause analysis to understand the proposed solution/ demo/ prototype before sharing it with the customer
  
Deploy and facilitate new change requests to cater to customer needs and requirements
  
Support QA team with periodic testing to ensure solutions meet the needs of businesses by giving timely inputs/feedback
  
Conduct Integration Testing and User Acceptance demoÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂs testing to validate implemented solutions and ensure 100% success rate
  
Use data modelling practices to analyze the findings and design, develop improvements and changes
  
Ensure 100% utilization by studying systems capabilities and understanding business specifications
  
Stitch the entire response/ solution proposed to the RFP/ RFI before its presented to the customer
  
  

b. Support Project Manager/ Delivery Team in delivering the solution to the customer
  
  

Define and plan project milestones, phases and different elements involved in the project along with the principal consultant
  
Drive and challenge the presumptions of delivery teams on how will they successfully execute their plans
  
Ensure Customer Satisfaction through quality deliverable on time
  
͏
  
  

3\. Build domain expertise and contribute to knowledge repository
  
  

Engage and interact with other BAÃÂÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂs to share expertise and increase domain knowledge across the vertical
  
Write whitepapers/ research papers, point of views and share with the consulting community at large
  
Identify and create used cases for a different project/ account that can be brought at Wipro level for business enhancements
  
Conduct market research for content and development to provide latest inputs into the projects thereby ensuring customer delight
  
͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No. Performance Parameter Measure
  
1\. Customer Engagement and Delivery Management PCSAT, utilization % achievement, no. of leads generated from the business interaction, no. of errors/ gaps in documenting customer requirements, feedback from project manager, process flow diagrams (quality and timeliness), % of deal solutioning completed within timeline, velocity generated.
  
2\. Knowledge Management No. of whitepapers/ research papers written, no. of user stories created, % of proposal documentation completed and uploaded into knowledge repository, No of reusable components developed for proposal during quarter
  
  

**Mandatory Skills:** Business Analysis .
  
  

**Experience:** 5\-8 Years .

description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


The Ivalua Consultant is responsible for the design, implementation, configuration, and management of **Ivalua Source‑to‑Pay (S2P)** solutions. Depending on the level, the role ranges from execution support and configuration to solution architecture, delivery ownership, and people leadership.


**Core Responsibilities (Applies Across Levels)**


* Implement and support **Ivalua S2P modules** including:
* + Sourcing
	+ Supplier Management (SIM)
	+ Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM)
	+ Procure‑to‑Pay (P2P)
	+ Invoicing \& Spend Analysis
* Translate procurement and business requirements into Ivalua solutions
* Configure forms, workflows, approvals, and business rules
* Support integrations with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, others)
* Conduct testing (SIT/UAT), cutover, and go‑live support
* Prepare functional documentation and training materials
* Ensure adherence to best practices and solution quality standards
**Your Profile**
----------------


* Assist in requirement documentation and configuration
* Perform basic Ivalua setup and data validation
* Execute test cases and defect tracking
* Support post‑go‑live activities and issue resolution
* Basic understanding of S2P / procurement processes
* Exposure to Ivalua platform
* Strong documentation and learning aptitude

title: Docusign - Developer or Senior Developer
description:
DocuSign Developer
  
**Years of Experience:** 3 to 9 years
  
**Work Location:** Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Gurgaon, Noida, Kolkata, Cochin, Coimbatore
  
Notice Period – Immediate to 30 Days
  
  

**About the Role:**  

We are seeking a skilled and experienced DocuSign Developer to join our team and lead the design, development, and integration of DocuSign eSignature and CLM solutions. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in DocuSign APIs, templates, workflows, and system integrations, with a passion for streamlining digital agreement processes.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

Design, develop, and maintain DocuSign eSignature and CLM solutions.
  
Create and manage templates, envelopes, PowerForms, and custom workflows.
  
Integrate DocuSign with internal systems (e.g., Salesforce, SharePoint, SAP, etc.) using REST APIs and SDKs.
  
Collaborate with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
  
Ensure compliance with security and data privacy standards.
  
Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to DocuSign functionality and integrations.
  
Provide documentation, training, and support to end\-users and internal teams.
  
  

**Required Qualifications:**  

5\+ years of hands\-on experience with DocuSign eSignature and/or CLM.
  
Proficiency in DocuSign APIs (REST, SOAP) and SDKs (Java, .NET, Node.js, etc.).
  
Experience with OAuth, JWT, and other authentication methods.
  
Strong understanding of document lifecycle management and digital signature workflows.
  
Experience integrating DocuSign with platforms like Salesforce, Microsoft 365, or custom applications.
  
Familiarity with JSON, XML, and scripting languages (JavaScript, Python, etc.).Excellent problem\-solving and communication skills.
  
  

**Preferred Qualifications:**  

DocuSign Developer Certification(s).
  
Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.
  
Experience with other eSignature platforms is a plus.
