title: Consulting-HC-IIO-AIS-Life Actuarial-Sr. Consultant
description:
**Human Capital**  

The Human Capital Offering Portfolio focuses on helping organizations manage and sustain their performance through their most important asset: their people. Centered on five core issues, this Portfolio signifies to the market that we see Human Capital as a topic critical to the C\-Suite. As we go\-to\-market we will show our clients that we serve more than HR organizations – from the CEO to CFO, Risk Manager to Business Unit leader—and that we deliver on our issues and help create value for our clients. **Position Summary** **Level**: Consultant /Senior Consultant  

As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions. **Work you’ll do:**  

The Professional will support transformation and migration projects, consulting engagements and audit work by applying US GAAP, STAT, TAX, IFRS 17, and LDTI regulations. Additionally, the professional will utilize their modeling and technical skills to develop or modify actuarial tools that validate various financial cash flows and results generated by life insurance companies.  

We will look to you to lead client engagement teams in Actuarial and Insurance Solutions (AIS) practice. The work may include one or more items from the list below (not exhaustive):* Work on GGY/Moody’s Axis modelling projects
* Get involved in transformation/migration from one actuarial software to another
* Build/modify excel spreadsheets/actuarial software that project and validate the cashflows generated by models
* Acquire knowledge and remain well versed with US products and Regulations
* Apply US GAAP, STAT and TAX, IFRS17 and LDTI regulations to products for calculating reserves, and other cashflows
* Work on Prophet, GGY/Moody’s Axis, Polysystems or Moses actuarial models
* Interpret assumptions and experience studies results of insurance companies
* Lead current projects with minimal support from project managers
* Help in training, mentoring, and motivating junior staff
* Bridge the knowledge gap within the team and provide overall perspective
* Develop and maintain client/internal relationships.
**The team:**  

Insights, Innovation \& Operate offering is designed to enhance key aspects of our clients' businesses by leveraging cutting\-edge technology, data, and a blend of deep technical and human expertise. We innovate and deliver creative, industry\-specific solutions that streamline operations and accelerate speed\-to\-value.  

Our actuarial consultants provide a full range of life insurance auditing and consulting services to clients. We help our clients combine data, processes, and technology to provide valuable business insights and ensure accurate financial and statutory reporting of their business results. Our team members work collaboratively and apply their specialized knowledge and experience to help clients navigate complex financial and statutory reporting concepts. We offer deep insights into their business practices and procedures and help them make more informed decisions to enhance their business’ efficiencies. **Qualifications** **Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:*** 3\- 9 years of hands\-on experience in life insurance actuarial domain
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Consulting mindset – must be willing to learn new skills and adapt to changing business environment
* Excellent problem solving and client service skills
* Proven project and people management capabilities
* Willingness and ability to travel to meet client needs
* Good understanding of cash\-flow projection methodologies for life insurance products
* Good understanding of concepts, regulations and guidelines and application of it to multiple projects
* Strong Product knowledge is expected (specifically US products), with experience in Pricing, Valuation or Reporting.

**Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:*** Experience in GGY/Moody’s AXIS Modelling will be preferred
* Candidates with modelling experience and software migration experience will be preferred
* Advance knowledge and experience in Actuarial software including AXIS, Prophet, Moses shall be critical factor for hiring
* Candidates with strong experience in Reinsurance valuation, modelling or reporting will be preferred
* Strong experience of US GAAP, US STAT or LDTI shall be preferred
* Strong US Product knowledge, specifically in FIA, is expected, with experience in Reserving, Valuation or Reporting
* Candidates are expected to possess strong life actuarial technical skills with a strong consulting mindset. Who could work with multiple clients and have extremely good communication skills
**Education**:* Graduation/Post Graduation with mathematics/statistics or any subject with sizeable mathematical content
**Location**:* Hyderabad/Bengaluru/Gurgaon

**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: GIS Senior Developer
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* Infosys is the business critical technology partner for the world s most successful organizations
* As a global leader in Business Transformation Infosys provides strategic business consulting technology engineering and outsourcing services to help clients leverage technology and create impactful and measurable business value for every IT investment
* We are looking for a candidate with a strong utility and GIS domain background in playing a techno functional lead role in implementing GIS solutions for Electric Gas Utilities specific to ESRI platforms
* The candidate will need to have experience in implementing GIS solutions in North American Utilities markets
* Experience in implementing other GIS systems will be an added advantage
* Candidates with strong development background in Esri suite of applications will be preferred in this role

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Should be able to build test and deploy solution on ESRI ArcGIS Desktop ArcGIS Server Javascript API HTML5 Type Script React JS ArcGIS Online Web App Builder and ArcGIS Mobile
* Should be familiar with the latest technological trends in the GIS Industry and the roadmap of Esri solutions
* Should be able to map the customer requirements into the product and suggest workarounds solutions for the requirements
* Should be able to guide the developers in resolving issues related to the development
* The key focus areas will be Javascript API HTML5 Type Script Silverlight API and ArcGIS Runtime development platform Xamarin Java etc
* Develop GIS based POCs to showcase ideas present demos to the business users
* Should be able to design the forms workflows and portlets and integration with the required systems
* Should have expertise in development of solutions in the mobile platform
* Should be able to perform issue resolutions during support Post Go Live phase
* Should be able to assist the Testing team with the functional areas to be tested
* The candidate must be a team player and is also expected to help the project team with any functional and technical issues that may arise during the course of the project
* Participate in project review meetings internal and with the client
* Should be open to learning any new technologies in the GIS space if required

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* 3 5 years of total IT industry experience with at least 3 years in implementing GIS ESRI based Solutions
* Programming experience in Java Script Type Script is required
* Knowledge in Electric Gas Transmission and Distribution domain
* Good interpersonal communication and analytical ability
* Strong soft skills required
* Ready to travel to client locations as needed
* Proficiency in writing Stored Procedures Functions in PL SQL for Oracle
* Databases Oracle Spatial
* Experience in ETL tool like FME

title: Oracle Cloud Integration Senior Consultant
description:
**Oracle Cloud Integration \- Senior Consultant, Managed Services**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations maximize value from enterprise technologies across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations. As an Oracle Cloud Integration Senior Consultant within Managed Services, you will support the design, enhancement, and ongoing management of integration solutions that connect Oracle Cloud applications with broader enterprise platforms. Working alongside experienced advisors and technical specialists, you will help clients improve operational performance, enable reliable data movement across systems, and support business transformation through scalable technology solutions and managed services delivery.

**Level**: Senior Consultant or equivalent


As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions.

**Work you'll do**


As a Senior Consultant, Managed Services on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Designing, developing, and supporting Oracle Integration Cloud integrations between Oracle Cloud applications and enterprise or third\-party systems
* Building and maintaining integration flows, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, data extraction routines, and File\-Based Data Import processes for Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud environments
* Using BI Publisher reports, Structured Query Language, and Procedural Language/Structured Query Language to extract, transform, validate, and move data across systems
* Monitoring, debugging, migrating, and optimizing integrations, including large\-file processing, performance tuning, and encryption or decryption in File Transfer Protocol environments
* Providing production support across incident, problem, and enhancement management activities, including queue monitoring, ticket updates, service\-level agreement tracking, and coordination with stakeholders and delivery teams

**The team**


Enterprise Performance


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 6\-10 years of experience designing, developing, or supporting Oracle Integration Cloud integrations
* Experience designing and developing integrations to Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud using Representational State Transfer, Simple Object Access Protocol, and File\-Based Data Import uploads
* Experience extracting Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud data using BI Publisher reports within Oracle Integration Cloud
* Experience with Structured Query Language, Procedural Language/Structured Query Language, XML Schema Definition, Web Services Description Language, and Extensible Stylesheet Language Transformations
* Experience with Oracle Integration Cloud monitoring, debugging, migration, and large\-file data handling or performance tuning
* Experience with encryption and decryption in File Transfer Protocol environments, information technology service management processes, and production support activities tied to service\-level agreements
* Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university

Preferred:

* Experience with Oracle Visual Builder and Oracle Integration Cloud customizations
* Experience supporting integrations for Oracle Enterprise Resource Planning, Human Capital Management, or third\-party applications
* Experience preparing technical design documents, mapping documents, or integration specifications
* Experience applying integration security controls across cloud\-based interfaces and file transfers
* Experience supporting managed services or production support delivery models
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Consultant | Java | Chennai | Engineering | Platform Development & Integration
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108556
Date: Jul 13, 2026
Location: Chennai
Designation: Consultant
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**What impact will you make?**

  

Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services,

**Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivalled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.**

 **The Team**

Deloitte Digital has created a new model for a new age: The Creative Digital Consultancy. We're transforming the digital journey in a way an agency or traditional consultancy alone cannot–now leaders across their entire organization can come to one place to have their ambitions brought to life. We combined the creative and digital capabilities of our studios and the broad reach of an advertising agency with the technical experience, deep business strategy, and relationships of one of the world's largest consultancy to create something that is so much more than the sum of its parts. We can help you imagine bigger and scale as your business grows. Learn more about Digital

 **Work you’ll do as a Sr. Consultant and Consultant**

  

The primary role of a Consultant or Sr. Consultant is to be responsible for managing specific sub\-work stream (or sub\-modules) within a broader project. Sr. Consultants and Consultants on engagements report into the team lead/ manager and are responsible for end to end delivery of the sub\-work stream allocated to them.


The responsibilities of Sr. Consultant or Consultant should include:

* Perform maintenance on existing programs.
* Provide innovative and cost\-effective engineering solutions.
* Participate in knowledge sharing activities.
* Hands on experience with **Angular,** SpringBoot / Spring MVC.
* Hands on experience with MangoDB and any RDBMS
* Experience with cloud services like (AWS/Azure/Google Cloud)
* Strong hands on work experience in Design \& development of Responsive Web application
* Experience in **Web Services(REST, SOAP)**
* Hands on experience with **HTML(5\), JavaScript, CSS, Bootstrap, Angular (2\+), React JS, Vue JS**
* 
* Good understanding of object\-oriented programming, RDBMS, NoSQL
* Good analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
* This role involves extensive travel
* Experience with cloud services like (AWS/Azure/Google Cloud)

 **Good to have skillsets**

* Knowledge or implementation experience in Microservices based architecture.
* Kubernetes, Docker containers
* Building hybrid mobile applications (Ex: Flutter, React Native, Ionic )
* Hands on experience in **Java/J2EE/Sprintboot/MVC applications/Node JS**

 **Qualifications**

  

Sr. Consultant: 6\+ years of experience


Consultant: 3\+ years of experience


Professional Qualification \- B.E./B.Tech/MCA/MBA/MS

**Your role as a leader**

  

At Deloitte India, we believe in the importance of leadership at all levels. We expect our people to embrace and live our purpose by challenging themselves to identify issues that are most important for our clients, our people, and for society and make an impact that matters.

  

In addition to living our purpose, Sr.Consultant or Consultant across our organization:

* Ability to execute a project using Agile techniques to quickly deliver value for clients
* Ability to propose solutions by adopting a customer\-centric view of the client’s strategy
* Ability to combine digital acumen and a domain specialization to create solutions for our clients
* Ability to build and contribute domain thought\-ware for use by the network
* Ability to select appropriate methods for collecting and analyzing data, and develop informed recommendations that shape or support the client’s business strategy
* Ability to address client business challenges in the intersection of process and technology
* Ability to produce a high quality work product and collaborate with others to deliver a superior client experience
* Ability to deliver key messages with clarity, confidence and poise to instill confidence in clients
* Ability to incorporate financial information when evaluating strategic options
* Ability to apply a global and diverse perspective to problem solving
* Ability to understand how business functions operate and how sector trends impact a client’s business
* Ability to organize insights and define a logical flow to tell a story when presenting recommendations
* Builds relationships and communicates effectively in order to positively influence peers and other stakeholders
* Identifies and embraces our purpose and values and puts these into practice in their professional life
* Seeks opportunities to challenge self; teams with others across businesses and borders to deliver and takes accountability for own and team results
* Understands objectives for clients and Deloitte, aligns own work to objectives and sets personal priorities
* Develops self by actively seeking opportunities for growth, shares knowledge and experiences with others, and acts as a strong brand ambassador

 **How you’ll grow**

  

At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry\-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build world\-class skills in addition to hands\-on experience in the global, fast\-changing


business world. From on\-the\-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Centre.

 **Benefits**

  

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

 **Our purpose**

Deloitte is led by a purpose: *To make an impact that matters*.

  

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the

  

Communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change. Learn more about Deloitte's impact on the world

 **Recruiter tips**


We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: Application Support Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** Application Support Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Act as software detectives, provide a dynamic service identifying and solving issues within multiple components of critical business systems.
  

**Must have skills :** Oracle Database Administration (DBA)  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **3** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary:
  

As an Oracle DB Configuration \& Administrator, a typical day involves Providing L1/L2 operational support for Oracle DB databases used by enterprise applications. This role requires a proactive approach to monitoring system performance, diagnosing problems, and ensuring the smooth operation of critical applications. The position demands continuous collaboration with different teams to maintain system stability and support business continuity through timely and effective problem resolution.  

  

Roles \& Responsibilities:
  

* Act as the primary point of contact for database related incidents, service requests, and user issues.
* Troubleshoot and resolve Oracle DB issues related to availability, connectivity, performance, capacity, and data access within defined SLAs.
* Participate in on call and shift based support rotations as part of the infrastructure operations model.
* Coordinate with application, infrastructure, cloud, and network teams during major incidents and outages
* Identify performance issues such as slow queries, index inefficiencies, or resource constraints and take corrective actions.
* Proactively detect potential issues and raise risks before they impact users or applications.
* Monitor Oracle DB instances using enterprise monitoring and alerting tools.
* Support Oracle DB patching, version upgrades, and maintenance activities as per infrastructure standards.
* Follow ITIL aligned processes for incident, change, and problem management.
* Participate in root cause analysis (RCA) for recurring Oracle DB incidents.
* Implement preventive actions to reduce repeat operational issues.
* Maintain accurate incident records and operational metrics for reporting.


  

Professional \& Technical Skills:
  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in Oracle Database Administration (DBA), Cloud Fundamentals (AWS), DB Monitoring Tools, Unix/Linux, Shell scripting , Cloud Migration experience.
* Experience in database performance tuning and optimization techniques.
* Strong understanding of backup and recovery procedures for database systems.
* Ability to manage database security, including user access and permissions.
* Familiarity with database monitoring tools and scripting for automation.
* Knowledge of data replication and high availability solutions.


  

Additional Information:
  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in Oracle Database Administration (DBA).


\- Flexible to work in Shifts during weekday \& Weekend during India hours (7 AM \- 10 PM IST)  

* This position is based at our Mumbai office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

  

15 years full time education

title: BSW Tester
description:
**Your Role**
-------------


As a BSW Tester, you will be responsible for planning, executing, and automating test activities for AUTOSAR Basic Software modules. You will work closely with software developers, system architects, and integration teams to ensure robust validation of embedded systems using industry\-leading Vector tools and HIL environments.


**Your Profile**
----------------


**Mandatory Skills:**


* Proven experience in AUTOSAR BSW testing, specifically Diagnostics, COM, and FM modules.
* Hands\-on experience in manual and automated testing of embedded software systems.
* Strong knowledge and practical experience with Hardware\-in\-the\-Loop (HIL) testing.
* Proficiency in Vector tools including CANoe, CANalyzer, CANape, and vTESTstudio.
* Experience in test automation using CAPL, Python, or similar scripting languages.
* Strong debugging, analysis, and problem\-solving skills.
* Understanding of automotive communication protocols such as CAN, LIN, FlexRay, or Ethernet.
* Familiarity with software development lifecycle and automotive validation processes.
**Preferred Skills**
--------------------


* ISTQB or equivalent software testing certification.
* Knowledge of AUTOSAR architecture and methodology.
* Experience with requirements management and defect tracking tools.
* Exposure to ASPICE, ISO 26262, or other automotive quality standards.
**In this role, you will**
--------------------------


* Perform validation and verification of AUTOSAR Basic Software (BSW) modules such as Diagnostics, Communication (COM), and Function Management (FM).
* Develop, execute, and maintain manual and automated test cases for embedded software components.
* Conduct Hardware\-in\-the\-Loop (HIL) testing to validate system functionality under real\-world scenarios.
* Utilize Vector toolchain including CANoe, CANalyzer, CANape, and vTESTstudio for testing, simulation, and analysis activities.
* Design and implement automation frameworks and test scripts using CAPL, Python, or equivalent scripting languages.
* Analyze test results, identify defects, and collaborate with development teams for issue resolution.
* Support integration, regression, and release testing activities.
* Prepare test reports, maintain documentation, and ensure compliance with automotive quality standards.
**What You'll Love About Working Here**
---------------------------------------


* Opportunity to work on cutting\-edge automotive embedded systems and AUTOSAR platforms.
* Exposure to advanced testing environments and industry\-leading Vector tools.
* Collaborative work culture with experienced automotive engineering teams.
* Continuous learning and growth through challenging projects and emerging vehicle technologies.
* Flexible work environment that encourages innovation and technical excellence
**About Capgemini in India**
----------------------------


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end\-to\-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.Capgemini in India comprises nearly 235,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem, and Tiruchirappalli.Make it real \| www.capgemini.com/in\-en.

description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


**The Opportunity:**

Capgemini is looking for a high‑calibre **AI Delivery Leader** to drive end‑to‑end delivery of AI solutions, enterprise products, and reusable accelerators. This role is ideal for strong AI delivery managers experienced in product implementations, asset rollouts, customization, and integration with enterprise systems.


This role provides opportunity to


* Lead **transformative AI and cloud delivery programs** impacting global enterprises.


* Opportunity to **drive innovation and delivery excellence** in next\-gen technologies.


* Inclusive, collaborative environment that values **diversity and continuous learning**.


**Key Responsibilities:**


**Delivery Leadership (Primary)**


* Own delivery across scope, schedule, cost, and quality.


* Run governance, KPIs, RAID, and stakeholder reporting.


* Manage client expectations, reviews, and escalations.


* Conduct delivery feasibility, planning, and fit–gap analysis.


**Technology Awareness**


* Knowledge of GenAI, LLMs, traditional ML, agentic systems.


* Understanding of enterprise AI patterns, esp. Document Intelligence.


* Awareness of integration patterns with ERPs, workflow/rule engines.


* Cloud deployment lifecycle knowledge (Azure (preferred), AWS, Google cloud).


* RPA knowledge is a plus.


**Solution \& Problem****‑****Solving**


* Collaborate with solution architects and technical teams to ensure solution design aligns with business objectives.


* Oversee deployment strategies, CI/CD pipelines, and operationalization of AI solutions across Azure and multi\-cloud environments.


* Guide solution design at a high level (not hands‑on architecture).


* Contribute to reusable frameworks and accelerators.


**Our Ideal Candidate**
-----------------------


* 17–20\+ years in software engineering.
* Bachelor’s/master’s in computer science, Software Engineering, Data/AI, or related field (or equivalent experience).

title: Oracle Cloud Supply Chain-Anlayst
description:
**Oracle Cloud Supply Chain – Analyst, Functional Transformation**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations unlock value from enterprise technologies across supply chain, finance, manufacturing, and IT operations. As part of this team, you will work with clients to support large\-scale digital transformation by combining business process knowledge, technology enablement, and functional delivery experience across Oracle Cloud Supply Chain solutions. Deloitte’s practitioners bring industry insight and implementation experience to help organizations improve operations, enhance performance, and drive meaningful outcomes across complex transformation programs.

**Level**: Analyst or equivalent


As an experienced analyst at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

**Work you'll do**


As a Analyst, Functional Transformation on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Supporting Oracle Supply Chain Management implementations across modules such as Manufacturing, Procurement, Order Management, Inventory, Bill of Materials, Work in Process, Advanced Pricing, Services, Advanced Supply Chain Planning, Demantra, and Costing
* Participating in project activities including requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, functional design, configuration, and testing
* Working with client stakeholders and delivery teams to support business process improvements across supply chain operations
* Contributing to end\-to\-end process areas such as Order to Cash and Procure to Pay as part of implementation and optimization efforts
* Delivering assigned work products within established timelines while coordinating with onsite and offshore team members as needed

**The team**


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 2\-3 years of experience supporting Oracle Supply Chain Management implementations
* 2\-3 years of experience in Oracle Supply Chain Management full\-cycle implementation as a team member or lead
* Experience with requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, business process design, configuration, and testing
* Experience supporting Oracle Supply Chain Management modules, including Manufacturing, Procurement, Order Management, Inventory, Bill of Materials, Work in Process, Advanced Pricing, Services, Advanced Supply Chain Planning, Demantra, and Costing
* Experience supporting end\-to\-end Order to Cash and Procure to Pay process areas
* Experience collaborating with clients on business process enhancement initiatives
* Bachelor of Engineering, Bachelor of Technology, Master of Computer Applications, Master of Science in Computer Science, or equivalent degree from an accredited university

Preferred:

* Experience working in onsite\-offshore delivery models
* Experience leading an Oracle applications workstream
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
Requisition code: 359231

title: OTM-Consultant / Manager/ Architect
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Your Role**
-------------


We are looking for experienced OTM Consultants with strong expertise in Oracle Transportation Management (OTM) implementation, configuration, and integration. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on experience in both functional and technical aspects of OTM across multiple modules.


* Strong functional system configuration skills in core OTM functionality and all modules including:
* Shipment Planning \& Execution
* Freight Settlement
* Sourcing
* Fleet Management
* Experience in B2B Integration using various standards and methods (EDI, API).

----------------

------------------------------------------

Competitive compensation and benefits.


Career development programs and certifications in cloud technologies.


A diverse and inclusive workplace that fosters innovation and collaboration.


Capgemini is an AI\-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22\.1 billion.

title: Data Modeler
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* We are looking for an experienced Data Modeler with 5 9 years of expertise in designing and maintaining enterprise data models to support analytics reporting and operational systems
* The ideal candidate should possess strong knowledge of data modeling database design data warehousing and data governance practices

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Design and maintain conceptual logical and physical data models based on business requirements
* Develop scalable and efficient database structures for transactional and analytical systems
* Collaborate with business stakeholders data architects and engineering teams to define data requirements and solutions
* Create and maintain data dictionaries metadata and data lineage documentation
* Design dimensional models such as Star Schema and Snowflake Schema for data warehousing solutions
* Ensure data quality consistency integrity and adherence to enterprise data standards
* Optimize data models and database designs for performance and scalability
* Support data governance initiatives and enforce data modeling best practices

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* 5 9 years of hands on experience in Data Modeling Database Design or Data Architecture
* Strong expertise in
* Conceptual Logical and Physical Data Modeling
* ER Modeling and Relational Database Design
* Data Warehousing and Dimensional Modeling
* Data Governance and Metadata Management
* Proficiency in SQL and experience with databases such as SQL Server Oracle PostgreSQL Snowflake or Azure SQL
* Experience with data modeling tools such as ERwin ER Studio PowerDesigner or equivalent
* Exposure to cloud data platforms such as Azure AWS or GCP
* Strong analytical problem solving and stakeholder management skills

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Bachelor s or Master s degree in Computer Science Information Technology Engineering or a related field

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Database\-\>Data Modeling

title: T&T_ET&P_Manager_SAP Treasury_Delhi
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108372
Date: Jul 10, 2026
Location: Delhi
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**Deloitte****.**



Be audacious in impact



When was the last time you **thought the unthinkable, defined the unfathomable**, or did what no one else has dared to try?



At Deloitte, we're creating bold new frontiers for our clients and communities. Our roar echoes across India and beyond. So, bring your unique self and rise louder and leap further than ever before.


**Manager \| SAP Treasury \| Delhi \| SAP**


* **Job requisition ID:** 108372
* **Location:** Delhi
* **Entity:** Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP


**The team**



Enterprise technology must do much more than keep the wheels turning; it is the engine that drives functional excellence and the enabler of innovation and long\-term growth. Learn more about ET\&P


**Your work profile**



As a Manager in our SAP Team, you’ll build and nurture positive working relationships with teams and clients with the intention to exceed client expectations: \-  


The primary role is to make immediate, direct contributions to enhancing our clients’ competitive position and performance in ways that are distinctive, innovative, and sustainable.  

* Managing company cash flows and liquidity forecasts within SAP Treasury.
* Identifying, analyzing, and mitigating financial risks such as interest rate, currency, and commodity risks.
* Expertise in dealing with various instruments like FX deals, money market instruments, derivatives, and securities.
* Managing centralized payment and collection processes using SAP In\-House Cash functionality.
* Handling bank communications, payment processing, and formats.
* Configuration and customization of SAP TRM for effective treasury operations.
* Real\-time cash position and forecasting reports generation.
* Ensuring seamless data flow between treasury and core finance modules.
* Managing hedge accounting processes in compliance with accounting standards.
* Understanding relevant financial regulations and internal controls.
* Familiarity with SAP’s modern interfaces for treasury operations.
* Generating and interpreting treasury reports for decision\-making.
* Experience in SAP Treasury implementation, upgrades, and support.
* Strong communication skills (written \& verbal)
* Willingness to travel for short and long term durations.
* Min. 1 implementation project of SAP TRM (Treasury) with SAP Certification

  


**Key skills required**


* Bachelors: Commerce/ Science / Engineering background from a premier institute preferred
* Relevant experience of 5\+ years

  


**Location and way of working**


* Base location: Delhi
* This profile involves frequent travelling to client locations.
* Hybrid is our default way of working. Each domain has customized the hybrid approach to their unique needs.

  


**You bring you**

title: Kafka Admin
description:
**Job Description:**
--------------------

  

* We are looking for an experienced Senior Kafka Administrator to lead the design implementation and management of highly scalable and resilient Kafka ecosystems
* This role requires deep expertise in distributed systems strong troubleshooting capabilities and the ability to architect enterprise grade streaming platforms
* You will play a key role in ensuring system reliability optimizing performance and guiding teams on best practices for real time data streaming

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
-------------------------

  

* Design deploy and manage large scale Kafka clusters across on premise and cloud environments
* Lead architecture decisions for high availability scalability and fault tolerance
* Monitor troubleshoot and optimize Kafka clusters to achieve optimal performance and uptime
* Handle capacity planning cluster sizing and performance tuning
* Manage advanced configurations including multi cluster replication MirrorMaker tiered storage and KRaft mode
* Configure and enforce security best practices SASL SSL TLS RBAC ACLs
* Implement robust backup disaster recovery and failover strategies
* Collaborate with engineering teams to design efficient event driven architectures and streaming pipelines
* Resolve complex production issues and lead root cause analysis RCA
* Automate infrastructure provisioning and operational tasks using tools like Terraform Ansible or scripts
* Lead Kafka upgrades migrations and platform enhancements with minimal downtime
* Establish and maintain monitoring alerting and logging frameworks
* Mentor junior engineers and provide technical leadership
* Create and maintain detailed documentation and operational runbooks

  

**Technical Requirements:**
---------------------------

  

* Primary skills Technology Java Apache
* 5 9 years of IT experience with at least 3 years in Kafka administration engineering
* Strong expertise in Apache Kafka internals brokers partitions replication ISR
* Deep understanding of distributed systems messaging frameworks and event streaming
* Experience with Kafka ecosystem tools Kafka Connect Kafka Streams Schema Registry
* Hands on experience with monitoring tools like Prometheus Grafana ELK or Splunk
* Strong Linux Unix administration skills
* Experience with cloud platforms AWS MSK Azure Event Hubs Kafka GCP Pub Sub Kafka integration
* Familiarity with containerization and orchestration Docker Kubernetes
* Expertise in scripting programming Python Bash or Java preferred
* Strong problem solving skills with the ability to handle critical incidents

  

**Additional Responsibilities:**
--------------------------------

  

* Bachelor s or Master s degree in Computer Science IT or a related field or equivalent practical experience

  

**Preferred Skills:**
---------------------


Technology\-\>Java\-\>Apache\-\>Kafka

title: ServiceNow SIAM - Senior Consultant
description:
**ServiceNow** **SIAM** **\- Senior Consultant**

**Enterprise Performance**


Deloitte’s Enterprise Performance practice helps organizations improve business outcomes through platform\-enabled transformation, technology modernization, and operational improvement. Within this space, our teams work across IT operations, service management, workflow automation, and enterprise platforms to deliver large\-scale digital transformation programs. As a ServiceNow Senior Consultant, Technical Transformation, you will work with cross\-functional teams to design, build, and enhance ServiceNow solutions that help clients streamline processes, improve service delivery, and create long\-term business value.

**Level**: Senior Consultant or equivalent


As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions.

**Work you'll do**


As a Senior Consultant, in the Enterprise Operations Portfolio team, you will be responsible for:

**Key Responsibilities**

* Service Design Leadership \& Business Process Mastery
* Coordinate Service Design phases (Alignment, Discovery, Prototype, Implement).
* Master client business processes and ensure service designs align with SLAs, compliance, and business operations.
* Engage suppliers and SMEs to capture operational impacts.
* Service Transition Planning \& Execution
* Lead Operational Impact Assessments and present to governance.
* Develop and refine Service Transition Plans.
* Coordinate E2E process development, Operational Guides, ORT input, and readiness deliverables.
* Deliver KT for SIAM services; ensure vendors deliver KT for their components.
* Drive PRC and Transition\-to\-Operations approvals.
* 3\. Process Development \& Governance
* Write and update new or modified processes, templates, playbooks, and RACIs.
* Support governance committees with process proposals.
* 4\. Knowledge Transfer Material Development \& Delivery\-
* Develop structured KT packages, runbooks, operational guides, and training materials and \- Deliver KT sessions and ensure receipt acknowledgment.

* 5\. Automation \& AI Enablement Integrate automation into workflows and enable AI insights for risk scoring and forecasting.
* Reporting \& Continuous Improvement\- Track metrics, success factors, risks, and lessons learned to refine processes.
* Stakeholder Engagement\-Collaborate directly with teams, vendors, SMEs, architects, and leadership.
* Tools \& ArtifactsService Design Package, Transition Plan, OIA, PRC, KT materials, Operational Guides.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 including night shift as per business requirements

**Qualifications:**

**Required**:

* 6\-10 years of ServiceNow development experience in large enterprise environments
* Experience in technology implementation across complex environments.
* Strong process development capability.
* Proven training and knowledge transfer experience.
* Business analysis expertise including requirements gathering.
* ITIL/ITSM knowledge; ITIL certification ideal.
* Project management experience; PMP is an asset.


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Associate Director - GTM & Sales Enablement
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As an Associate Director, GTM \& Sales Enablement within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will serve as the critical bridge between the SEG marketing team and the sales community — and the operational engine behind every offering launch. Working closely with Service Line Sales leaders, offering teams, and the SEG corporate marketing lead, you will ensure every sales professional is equipped with the tools, knowledge, and confidence to position SEG's offerings compellingly in the market.
  
Beyond core sales enablement, you will own the cross\-functional launch project management that brings together offering teams, sales, and marketing to ensure every launch lands cleanly and on time. Customer marketing — including existing client engagement, cross\-sell campaigns, and reference program development — also sits within this role, making it the most sales\-proximate and operationally critical position within the SEG marketing team.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Act as the cross\-functional coordinator for all SEG offering launches — owning the launch plan, driving alignment across offering teams, sales, and marketing, and ensuring every launch is delivered on time with the right materials in place.
  
Build and maintain a launch readiness checklist covering sales enablement, CRM configuration, campaign briefs, web updates, analyst communication, and partner activation — proactively tracking milestones and escalating blockers.
  
Own and maintain the sales enablement content library — including battlecards, one\-pagers, solution decks, objection\-handling guides, and FAQs — ensuring all materials remain current, accessible, and actively adopted by the sales community.
  
Design and deliver enablement sessions for sales, delivery, and market teams, while tracking attendance and knowledge retention.
  
Manage customer marketing initiatives — existing client engagement, reference program development, and cross\-sell/upsell campaigns — in close coordination with the sales team.
  
Maintain the Winzone CRM configuration for all SEG offerings, ensuring accurate tagging, opportunity capture, and pipeline hygiene.
  
Build and monitor offering\-level pipeline reporting, delivering weekly pipeline reviews to leadership with insights on anomalies and coverage gaps.
  
Gather win/loss feedback from the sales team, synthesize insights, and route improvements to the Portfolio \& Content AD for messaging updates.
  
Manage partner co\-marketing coordination with AWS, Azure, and AI platform partners — covering joint content calendars, co\-sell activation timelines, and MDF utilization tracking.
  
Support analyst relations scheduling and briefing preparation in collaboration with the Analyst Relations and Portfolio \& Content AD teams.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
12\+ years of experience in GTM, sales enablement, product marketing, or a revenue\-facing marketing role within IT services or B2B technology.
  
MBA (Marketing/IT) preferred.
  
Proven experience managing cross\-functional technology offering launches with structured program management across sales, product, and marketing stakeholders.
  
Solid understanding of IT services sales cycles and how marketing supports complex enterprise deals.
  
Experience creating and maintaining a sales enablement content library for technology services — a portfolio of past work is essential.
  
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, with the ability to manage launches, enablement, customer marketing, and partner coordination simultaneously.
  
Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, Winzone, or equivalent, along with pipeline reporting experience.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience with partner ecosystems including AWS, Azure, or GCP co\-sell and MDF programs.
  
Background in customer marketing or client advocacy programs.
  
Comfort working directly with senior sales leaders and translating their feedback into actionable content and process improvements.
  
Ability to manage multiple priorities and thrive in a fast\-paced, matrixed, cross\-functional environment.
  
**Sales Enablement Impact:** High adoption of sales content and measurable improvement in sales team confidence and readiness.
  
**Launch Excellence:** On\-time, well\-coordinated offering launches with all enablement and campaign materials in place.
  
**Pipeline Health:** Accurate CRM configuration and consistent pipeline reporting that drives informed leadership decisions.
  
**Partner Activation:** Effective co\-marketing execution with strategic partners resulting in joint pipeline and visibility.
  
**Customer Engagement:** Strengthened client relationships through targeted cross\-sell campaigns and a robust reference program.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a hybrid role based in Bangalore, with day\-to\-day proximity to the SEG sales community strongly preferred. The role requires flexibility to coordinate across US, UK, and India time zones. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.

title: Specialist Assistant Manager - Growth and Development (Audit & Assurance) - Gurugram
description:
**Specialist Assistant Manager, Talent Development**


At Deloitte, we are known for setting a standard of excellence \- and for the people delivering it! The Development Center of Excellence (COE), delivers value through business\-focused, efficient, and innovative learning, performance, and development solutions and by building the world’s best leaders. Structured to achieve tight alignment with the businesses while advancing Deloitte’s brand in the marketplace, this COE consists of dedicated Development Advisors and Subject Matter Advisors (SMAs).

**Work you'll do**


As an Assistant Manager, Talent Development on the Audit and Assurance Talent Development team, you will be responsible for:

* Support onboarding, continuous development, and career milestone programs by coordinating end\-to\-end planning, delivery, and execution.
* Partner with business stakeholders, vendors, human resources teams, and subject matter professionals to identify learning needs and deploy capability\-building programs.
* Contribute to learning roadmaps, annual planning, and program strategies aligned to business priorities.
* Manage program operations including schedules, participant communications, reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and vendor coordination.
* Use feedback, metrics, and learning analytics to assess program effectiveness, improve learner experience, and support decision\-making.

**The team**


In our US India offices, the Audit and Assurance Talent Development team supports capability development and career progression for professionals. The team works closely with stakeholders, other HR channels, internal design/delivery and vendor teams to provide holistic well\-rounded solutions to client issues and develop professionals for success in their roles.

**Location: Gurugram**

**Shift Timings: 9 AM to 6 PM**

**Qualifications**


Required:

* MBA, PGDBA, PGDBM, PGCHRM, or equivalent degree
* 7\-8 years of experience in Learning and Development or Talent Development in matrixed organizations serving international markets
* Experience managing end\-to\-end training processes, including training needs identification and program delivery
* Experience managing vendors, budgets, and forecasts for learning programs
* Experience managing projects across cross\-border stakeholder groups
* Experience using learning metrics, reporting, and analytics to assess program effectiveness

Preferred:


* Experience supporting onboarding and career milestone learning programs
* Experience with end\-to\-end program management
* Experience with Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint
* Experience working with learning technologies and technology\-enabled learning solutions
* Experience supporting instructional design or content development
* Experience managing multiple workstreams in a decentralized or matrixed organization


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Data Science Research Senior Analyst
description:
This role is in Accenture Research Global Data Science Team.
  
  

We are looking for a data scientist with deep business knowledge and a research mindset and a passion for data\-driven insight discovery.
  
  

We offer a career aligned to creating innovation and client’s impact, managing complex data driven research projects, with multinational and multidisciplinary teams. Our team constantly explores the latest GenAI models to identify novel business opportunities, we are a global and integrated team with a high degree of work flexibility (conditional on local laws and policies). We provide opportunities to learn new skills through coaching, supervision, mentoring and external trainings.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities include:**  

Design and deliver high impact agentic GenAI and Machine Learning research projects to our client teams.
  
Drive innovation collaborating closely with industry leads, innovation experts, and business stakeholders
  
Develop groundbreaking and differentiated GenAI and Machine Learning assets.
  
Support the adoption of data science research tools and outputs within Accenture
  
  

**What we offer:**  

We have access to 100\+ business data sources through our research data lake. We are constantly expanding our universe of data from commercial and open sources and partnering with premium data providers to improve quality of inputs into our models.
  
We provide several unique training opportunities to continue your growth, including both internal trainings, on the job, personal exploration time to work on novel methodologies without the constraints of a projects and with leading universities.
  
  

**Experience and skills:**  

o Expertise in developing and building GenAI agentic architecture. Knowledge of Gemini ADK is a plus.
  
o Experience in adopting GenAI model APIs both for app development and as data analytics tool.
  
o Knowledge of GCP, VertexAI and Agent Garden.
  
o Knowledgeable Data Science SME (GenAI, Machine Learning, Python, Google Cloud, SQL, NLP, text analytics, data\-wrangling, etc…)
  
o Understanding of business dynamics and how to incorporate them into data science models
  
o Strong analytical skills and a proven ability to make sense out of data
  
o Strategic problem solver with the ability to take an issue and turn it into a researchable question
  
**o Strong professional qualities:** client focus, decisiveness, integrity, resilience to stress against stretch goals and deadlines
  
o Excellent communication (written and oral) and interpersonal skills
  
o Solid experience in the presentation of research deliverables to high level executives
  
o Enthusiasm to work effectively in a global, multi\-cultural team
  
  

Additional Information
  
  

**Reports to:** Research Principal Director in Data Science research
  
**Education:** Bachelor’s degree in Business Analytics, Statistics, Economics, Computer Science or similar. Masters’ preferred.
  
**Work Experience:** 1 to 3 years of relevant relevant experience related to data science/NLP, GenAI and business insights.
  
**Location:** Hyderabad, India
  
**Preferred start date:** At the earliest.

**Job Description:**  

Identity \& Access Management (IAM) Analyst – Application Access Provisioning͏
  
  

**Exp:** 8\-10years
  
  

**joining:** Hyderabad
  
  

Role Title
  
  

Identity \& Access Management (IAM) Analyst – Application Access Provisioning
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

Provides key representation for, and source of expertise on all issues with relevant subject matter. Work with our business partners (IAM teams around the Group) to implement effective information technology processes to achieve the business partner’s objectives. Delivery services in accordance with Service Level and Performance Level agreements. IAM Security processes are 24/7 and many are business critically fully migrated teams.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
  

Access Provisioning \& Administration
  
  

Process user access requests, modifications, and revocations for business applications in accordance with established procedures and SLAs.
  
Perform Joiner, Mover, and Leaver (JML) access activities.
  
Validate approvals and ensure requests comply with access governance requirements.
  
Provision and maintain user entitlements across various applications and platforms.
  
Execute emergency and privileged access requests in accordance with approved procedures.
  
Support bulk access provisioning and remediation activities.
  
  

Qualifications
  
  

8 years of experience in Identity and Access Management, User Administration, Service Desk, or Application Support roles.
  
Relevant certifications such as ITIL Foundation, or IAM\-related certifications are desirable.
  
  

Preferred Experience
  
  

Experience working in a large enterprise environment.
  
Exposure to audit and regulatory requirements.
  
Knowledge of ITSM tools such as ServiceNow.
  
Experience supporting access certification campaigns and entitlement reviews.
  
Understanding of privileged access management concepts and controls.
  
  

Key Performance Indicators
  
  

Access requests processed within agreed SLAs.
  
Accuracy and quality of provisioning activities.
  
Compliance with audit and security requirements.
  
Reduction in access\-related incidents and rework.
  
Customer satisfaction and stakeholder feedback.
  
Successful support of access certification and remediation activities.
  
  

**Mandatory Skills:** UAM \- User Access Management .
  
  

**Experience:** 5\-8 Years .

description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.

-------------


We are seeking an experienced PPM Finance Consultant with strong expertise in Project Portfolio Management (PPM) and financial planning processes. The ideal candidate will drive project financial management, support business decision\-making, and ensure alignment between project execution and financial goals.

* Generate dashboards and insights for leadership decision\-making

**Job Title:** DEVELOPER L4
  
**City:** Bengaluru
  
**State/Province:** Karnataka
  
**Posting Start Date:** 7/13/26
  
**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

1\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
  
  

Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
  
Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
  
Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
  
Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
  
Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
  
Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
  
Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities
  
͏
  
  

2\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
  
  

Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
  
Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
  
Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
  
Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
  
Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
  
Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
  
Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
  
Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
  
Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
  
Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders
  
͏
  
  

3\. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
  
  

Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
  
Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
  
Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
  
Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
  
Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
  
Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
  
Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
  
Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally
  
͏
  
  

Deliver
  
  

No. Performance Parameter Measure
  
1\. Continuous Integration, Deployment \& Monitoring of Software 100% error free on boarding \& implementation, throughput %, Adherence to the schedule/ release plan
  
2\. Quality \& CSAT On\-Time Delivery, Manage software, Troubleshoot queries, Customer experience, completion of assigned certifications for skill upgradation
  
3\. MIS \& Reporting 100% on time MIS \& report generation
  
  

**Mandatory Skills:** AI Dataiku .
  
  

**Experience:** 5\-8 Years .
  
  

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.
