description:
Job Description \#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-now: focus, \#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-\#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-now: focus, \#body.unify div.unify\-button\-container .unify\-apply\-
  
**Job Title:** SCRUM MASTER L1
  
**City:** Hyderabad
  
**State/Province:** Telangana
  
**Posting Start Date:** 7/13/26
  
**Wipro Limited (NYSE:** WIT, BSE: 507685, NSE: WIPRO) is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients’ most complex digital transformation needs. Leveraging our holistic portfolio of capabilities in consulting, design, engineering, and operations, we help clients realize their boldest ambitions and build future\-ready, sustainable businesses. With over 230,000 employees and business partners across 65 countries, we deliver on the promise of helping our customers, colleagues, and communities thrive in an ever\-changing world. For additional information, visit us at www.wipro.com.
  
  

**Job Description:**  

Job Description
  
  

Role Purpose
  
  

As a trained Scrum Master, you are responsible for facilitating a Scrum team and are accountable for removing impediments of the team to achieve the sprint goals/deliverables. You are responsible to ensure that the Scrum process is used as intended. A key part of your role is to protect the development team, allow the teams to be self managed, foster collaboration across teams and keep them focused on the tasks at hand.
  
  

͏
  
  

Do
  
  

Is accountable for meeting Sprint objectives along with scrum team
  
Ensure meeting of sprint commitment
  
Own and help resolve impediments of the team
  
Help PO adopt Scrum Process properly and ensure PO availability
  
Support the PO in maintaining the Product Backlog, defining User Stories and Acceptance Criteria
  
Facilitate estimation, backlog refinement and all planning ceremonies
  
Ensure that DOR, DOD, Acceptance criteria is available and adhered to
  
Ensure MoSCoW adherence of Sprint Backlog at the Sprint level
  
Accountable for the correct implementation of the Agile Process
  
Protect the team from external interference.
  
Facilitate technical assistance to the team and enables clear communication amongst the team members
  
Participate in Scrum of Scrum across teams and highlights impediments
  
Provide feedback on the team members performance to the Agile Line manager and Agile Program Leader
  
Facilitate all the Scrum Ceremonies (Planning, Daily Standup, Grooming, Demo, restrospection) and ensure correct adoption
  
͏
  
Ensure updating of all Scrum artifacts
  
Ensure ALM tool (either client or Wipro) is updated on a daily basis
  
Update key Scrum metrics into Wipro internal tool on a Sprint\-by\-Sprint basis
  
Analyse key Scrum metrics and take corrective actions
  
Create competency improvement and cross\-skilling plan for the team (by the start of the project). Review monthly and ensure improvement in competency score. Ensure multiskilling for at least 50% of the team.
  
Help team attain stable velocity within 6\-8 sprints (allowing for 10% variation either way)
  
Train team on the proper adoption of Agile processes (Scrum / XP / Kanban)
  
Help in adoption of engineering practices like ATDD, TDD, CI, CD, Refactoring
  
Record and own the restrospection actions
  
Participate in community of practice initiatives
  
Provide inputs to the Line manager for internal quality forums (QIC / APR / QBR / MBR etc.)
  
͏
  
͏
  
**Mandatory Skills:** Agile Scrum Methodology .
  
  

**Experience:** 5\-8 Years .
  
  

Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

title: Senior Manager - Communications
description:
About Cognizant Corporate
  
Cognizant Corporate is a global community united by a shared purpose: to make a meaningful impact. We are committed to excellence and driven by outcomes that matter. Collaboration is at the heart of how we work, and our forward\-thinking mindset fuels continuous learning, innovation, and growth. At Cognizant, careers transcend titles. We empower our people to think strategically, inspire others, and lead with purpose – always guided by our core values. Join us in shaping the future of business.
  
About the Role
  
As a Senior Manager, Executive Communications \& Social within the Software Engineering Group (SEG), you will build SEG's executive visibility and client proof\-point library. You will own the social media and industry publication content programme for 15–20 senior SEG leaders, develop the case study and proof\-point narrative pipeline that powers sales conversations and campaigns, and prepare executives for external events, roundtables, and panel appearances.
  
This is a specialist writing and communications role — not a general content marketing position. The ideal candidate writes convincingly in multiple executive voices, brings proven experience ghostwriting LinkedIn content for senior business leaders, and has a sharp editorial instinct for what engages a C\-suite audience. The role reports to the SEG Marketing lead and works closely with the Portfolio \& Content AD, with a dotted\-line relationship to the Director, Service Line Marketing Leader, SEG to ensure all output is on\-message and accurately reflects SEG's positioning.
  
  

**In this role, you will:**  

Own the social media and industry publication content programme for 15–20 senior SEG leaders — ghostwriting posts, articles, and commentary that reflect each leader's authentic voice while maintaining SEG's brand positioning.
  
Build and maintain a ready\-to\-deploy amplification kit — including pre\-written posts, repurposed content, and engagement prompts — that makes it easy for leaders to amplify SEG content consistently.
  
Develop a content calendar for executive social aligned to campaign moments, events, product launches, and key industry conversations, tracking performance and iterating based on C\-suite audience engagement.
  
Develop client case studies and proof\-of\-concept narratives following a problem → approach → outcomes structure, for use in campaigns, sales conversations, and analyst briefings.
  
Build a reusable proof point library — short, sharp client outcome statements organized by vertical, offering, and buyer persona — for use across marketing and sales collateral.
  
Work closely with the GTM AD to identify the case studies and proof points most needed by the sales team, and prioritize the production pipeline accordingly.
  
Support speaker preparation for events, roundtables, and external panels — developing talking points, anticipating audience questions, and supporting rehearsal sessions for senior SEG leaders.
  
Produce short\-form content assets including video scripts, demo narratives, event summaries, and client\-facing proof points that do not require lengthy approval cycles.
  
Collaborate closely with the Director, Service Line Marketing Leader, SEG and the Portfolio \& Content AD to ensure all content produced by this role is on\-message and accurately reflects SEG's positioning.
  
Support external writers and Cognizant's central content team with SEG\-specific context and briefing material as required.
  
What You Need to Have to Be Considered
  
8–12 years of executive communications, corporate communications, or B2B content marketing experience within IT services, consulting, or technology.
  
MBA (Marketing/Communications) or equivalent postgraduate qualification preferred.
  
Outstanding writing ability in English — must write convincingly in multiple executive voices; a published portfolio of executive social or corporate communications content is strongly preferred.
  
Proven experience ghostwriting LinkedIn content for senior business leaders — this is a non\-negotiable requirement for this role.
  
Experience producing B2B case studies and proof point narratives for technology or professional services.
  
Ability to build and manage relationships with senior executives — confident, organized, discreet, and capable of managing multiple leader relationships simultaneously.
  
Strong editorial instinct — a clear sense of what engages a CIO or CFO\-level reader on LinkedIn and in sales materials.
  
These Will Help You Succeed
  
Experience preparing executives for conference appearances, media interviews, or analyst engagements.
  
Familiarity with LinkedIn's content algorithm and organic B2B performance optimization.
  
Background in AI, Cloud, Data Engineering, or ERP services marketing.
  
Ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional, and matrixed environment.
  
**Executive Visibility:** Consistent, high\-quality social content that builds the personal brand and thought leadership of senior SEG leaders across LinkedIn and industry publications.
  
**Proof Point Impact:** A well\-maintained, sales\-ready library of client case studies and outcome statements actively used across campaigns and sales conversations.
  
**Content Quality:** On\-message, editorially sharp content that resonates with C\-suite audiences and reflects SEG's positioning accurately.
  
**Event Readiness:** Well\-prepared executives who deliver confident, compelling narratives at external events, roundtables, and panel appearances.
  
**Sales Enablement Support:** Timely delivery of proof points and case studies that directly address the needs of the sales community.
  
Work Model
  
We believe hybrid work is the way forward as we strive to provide flexibility wherever possible. This is a remote\-friendly role based in Bangalore, requiring regular virtual collaboration with senior SEG leaders across India, the US, and the UK, with flexibility to accommodate different time zones as needed. Regardless of your working arrangement, we are here to support a healthy work\-life balance through our various wellbeing programs.
  
The working arrangements for this role are accurate as of the date of posting and may change based on business and client requirements. Rest assured, we will always be clear about role expectations.
  
We're excited to meet people who share our mission and can make an impact in a variety of ways. Don't hesitate to apply, even if you only meet the minimum requirements listed. Think about your transferable experiences and unique skills that make you stand out as someone who can bring new and exciting things to this role.

title: T24 Upgrade | 6 to 12 Years | Pan India
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


* Resource should be an experienced T24 Upgrade Specialist with hands\-on experience in Temenos Transact (T24\) core banking systems.
* The candidate will lead and manage complex upgrade projects, ensuring seamless transitions across environments, minimal downtime, and full compliance with Temenos best practices.
* This role demands deep technical expertise, strategic thinking, and strong leadership capabilities.
**Primary Skills**
------------------


* Lead end\-to\-end T24 upgrade projects (TAFJ/TAFC) across multiple environments (DEV, UAT, PROD).
* Perform technical assessments, impact analysis, and gap analysis for upgrade readiness.
* Design and implement upgrade strategies, including data migration, customization retrofitting, and integration validation.
* Collaborate with Temenos, infrastructure teams, and business stakeholders to ensure alignment and risk mitigation.
* Manage technical teams, provide mentorship, and ensure adherence to project timelines and quality standards.
* Conduct performance tuning, environment optimization, and post\-upgrade validation.
* Prepare and maintain technical documentation, including upgrade runbooks, rollback plans, and audit reports.
* Stay updated with Temenos release notes, patches, and regulatory compliance requirements.
* Expertise in T24 upgrades (Rxx to Rxx, e.g., R17 to R22\), including TAFJ and TAFC frameworks.
* Should have performed upgrade from TAFC to TAFJ.
* Strong knowledge of T24 architecture, COB, Local customizations and Upgrade.
* Proficiency in jBase, Infobasic Code, TAFJ, TAFC, Unix/Linux, Oracle/SQL Server.

title: Oracle Cloud Technical Senior Consultant
description:
**Oracle Cloud Technical \- Senior Consultant, Managed Services**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations maximize value from enterprise technologies across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations. As a Senior Consultant within Managed Services, you will support clients in sustaining, enhancing, and optimizing cloud\-based solutions that drive operational performance and business continuity. Working as part of a team of experienced advisors and technical specialists, you will help deliver scalable solutions, solve complex operational challenges, and support ongoing transformation through technology, process improvement, and managed services delivery.

**Level**: Senior Consultant or equivalent


As a Senior Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-scale software solutions, lead the creation of robust pipelines and manage code deployment across environments. You will collaborate with cross\-functional, global teams to translate functional requirements into effective deliverables, independently guiding and mentoring junior team members. Your role spans the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, execution, and tracking key metrics for analysis, ensuring high\-quality and timely delivery of solutions.

**Work you'll do**


As a Senior Consultant, Managed Services on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for:

* Designing, developing, and supporting Oracle Cloud technical solutions across managed services engagements
* Building and maintaining reports, interfaces, extensions, and data conversion components using SQL, BI Publisher, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting Studio, and File\-Based Data Import templates
* Developing and supporting integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud, Service\-Oriented Architecture, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, and Web Services Description Language\-based services
* Performing production support activities, including issue analysis, queue monitoring, ticket updates, code migration support, and resolution within service\-level requirements
* Collaborating with functional, technical, onsite, and offshore teams to support testing, deployments, enhancements, and ongoing platform stability

**The team**


Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise package insights and platform technology, working across finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and IT operations to support delivery of holistic performance improvement and package led large scale digital transformation. Join our team of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business insights and collaborate with the businesses as they navigate their enterprise growth and transformation journeys.


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24x7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 6\-10 years of experience in Oracle Cloud technical implementation, enhancement, or managed services support
* Experience developing conversions, interfaces, reports, and extensions using SQL, BI Publisher, Oracle Transactional Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting Studio, and File\-Based Data Import templates
* Experience supporting 4\-5 Oracle Cloud modules, including navigation, data tables, and end\-to\-end process flows
* Experience developing or supporting integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud, Service\-Oriented Architecture, Representational State Transfer services, Simple Object Access Protocol services, and Web Services Description Language
* Experience with BI Publisher reports, Enterprise Scheduler Service jobs, data conversions, and production support activities
* Experience with information technology service management processes, including incident, problem, and enhancement management, stakeholder updates, and service\-level agreement\-based support
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering, computer science, information technology, or business

Preferred:

* Experience delivering 2\-3 integrations using Oracle Integration Cloud or Service\-Oriented Architecture
* Experience applying cloud integration patterns in Oracle Cloud environments
* Experience with business intelligence security roles
* Experience with code migration, code reviews, naming standards, and technical quality practices
* Experience with performance tuning and SQL optimization
* Experience supporting global delivery teams across onsite and offshore models
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: T&T- Customer | CS&D | Technical program manager | Pune | Manager
description:
Job requisition ID :: 108594
Date: Jul 13, 2026
Location: Pune
Designation: Manager
Entity: Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP
**The team**

  



Customer is about much more than just the numbers. It’s about attesting to accomplishments and challenges and helping to assure strong foundations for future aspirations. Deloitte exemplifies the what, how, and why of change so you’re always ready to act ahead. Learn more about Customer


**Role Overview**
-----------------



We are seeking an experienced and results\-driven **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** to lead complex technology initiatives and drive cross\-functional programs across engineering, product, operations, security, and business teams. The TPM will be responsible for planning, executing, governing, and delivering large\-scale technology programs while ensuring alignment with business objectives and technical strategy.



The ideal candidate will possess strong program management expertise, technical acumen, stakeholder management skills, and a proven track record of delivering enterprise\-scale technology solutions in an Agile environment.


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

  


### **Program Leadership**


* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of strategic technology programs from initiation through deployment and operational transition.
* Define program scope, objectives, roadmaps, timelines, milestones, and success metrics.
* Drive alignment across multiple teams and stakeholders to ensure successful execution of program goals.
* Identify and manage risks, dependencies, issues, and mitigation plans.


### **Technical Delivery Management**


* Partner with engineering, architecture, product, and infrastructure teams to deliver scalable and secure technology solutions.
* Translate business objectives into actionable technical execution plans.
* Monitor program progress, delivery metrics, and resource utilization.
* Ensure adherence to technology, security, and compliance standards.


### **Stakeholder Management**


* Communicate program status, risks, dependencies, and decisions to senior leadership and executive stakeholders.
* Facilitate governance meetings, steering committees, and executive reviews.
* Build strong partnerships across global teams and external stakeholders.


### **Agile Program Execution**


* Champion Agile, Scrum, and SAFe methodologies.
* Coordinate multiple Agile teams and manage release planning activities.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance delivery excellence and operational efficiency.


### **Risk \& Compliance Management**


* Ensure compliance with regulatory, security, privacy, and operational requirements.
* Collaborate with cybersecurity, risk, legal, and compliance teams as needed.
* Establish and track mitigation plans for business and technology risks.


### **Financial \& Resource Management**


* Support budget planning, forecasting, and resource allocation activities.
* Track program costs, delivery commitments, and resource utilization.
* Manage vendor and third\-party engagements when applicable.


**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------


* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
* 8\+ years of experience in Program Management, Project Management, or Technical Delivery roles.
* 5\+ years of experience managing large\-scale, cross\-functional technology programs.
* Strong understanding of Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC).
* Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
* Experience leading Agile delivery teams.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Proven ability to manage globally distributed teams.
* Strong analytical, organizational, and problem\-solving abilities.


**Preferred Qualifications**
----------------------------


* Master's degree (MBA or relevant technical discipline).
* PMP, PgMP, PMI\-ACP, SAFe, Scrum Master, or equivalent certifications.
* Experience in Payments, Financial Services, Banking, FinTech, E\-commerce, or Digital Transformation programs.
* Familiarity with APIs, Microservices, Data Platforms, Cybersecurity, and Enterprise Architecture.
* Experience leading digital modernization or cloud transformation initiatives.


**Technical Skills**
--------------------


* Program \& Portfolio Management
* Agile / Scrum / SAFe
* SDLC \& Release Management
* Cloud Technologies (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* API \& Microservices Architecture
* Jira, Confluence, Azure DevOps
* Data Analytics \& Reporting
* Risk \& Compliance Management
* Vendor Management
* Executive Reporting \& Governance


**Core Competencies**
---------------------


* Strategic Thinking
* Leadership \& Influence
* Executive Communication
* Stakeholder Management
* Problem Solving
* Decision Making
* Risk Management
* Change Management
* Collaboration \& Teamwork
* Customer\-Centric Mindset


**Success Metrics**
-------------------


* On\-time and within\-budget program delivery
* Achievement of business and technology objectives
* Effective management of risks and dependencies
* Stakeholder satisfaction and engagement
* Improved delivery efficiency and operational excellence

title: Infra. Architect
description:
Job Summary
  
M365 L3 Engineer \- India
  
  

Responsibilities
  
SharePoint \& OneDrive
  
Design implement and govern SharePoint Online site architectures and OneDrive configuration across large commercial tenants (50K\+ users).
  
Lead information architecture initiatives including taxonomy metadata strategies content types and hub site design.
  
Automate lifecycle management provisioning workflows and governance policies using PowerShell and Microsoft Graph API.
  
Manage storage quotas sharing policies external access controls and tenant\-wide configuration changes.
  
Drive adoption of SharePoint Syntex Viva Connections and modern communication/team sites.
  
Microsoft Teams
  
Administer and optimize Microsoft Teams at enterprise scale including policies calling plans and telephony integrations.
  
Govern Teams lifecycle management creation archival membership and naming conventions through automated pipelines.
  
Design and enforce meeting policies live event configurations and room/device management.
  
Integrate Teams with third\-party platforms bots and custom apps while ensuring security compliance.
  
Troubleshoot complex Teams voice meeting quality and federation issues in collaboration with network and AV teams.
  
Viva Insights
  
Deploy configure and manage Microsoft Viva Insights at the tenant level including advanced and manager insights.
  
Partner with HR People Analytics and business leaders to deliver privacy\-safe workforce analytics and wellbeing programs.
  
Build and maintain Viva Insights queries organizational data uploads and dashboard configurations.
  
Ensure compliance with data privacy regulations (GDPR CCPA) in the context of employee analytics.
  
Drive organizational change management and adoption programs around Viva Insights capabilities.
  
  

Certifications Required

title: Oracle Finance Analyst
description:
**Oracle Finance – Analyst, Functional Transformation**

**Enterprise Performance**


Our Enterprise Performance team helps organizations transform finance operations through leading platforms, functional insight, and large\-scale digital enablement. As part of this team, you will work with clients to improve core finance processes, support Oracle\-enabled transformation, and help drive greater visibility, efficiency, and control across the finance function. By bringing together strategy, process design, and technology enablement, we help organizations modernize operations and deliver measurable business outcomes.

**Level**: Analyst or equivalent


As an experienced Analyst at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need\-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

**Work you'll do**


As a Analyst, Functional Transformation on the Enterprise Performance team, you will be responsible for supporting Oracle Cloud Finance engagements that help organizations improve finance operations, strengthen reporting, and enable scalable transformation.

* Support the design, configuration, and deployment of Oracle Cloud Finance solutions across modules such as General Ledger, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Cash Management, and Fixed Assets.
* Gather business requirements, perform fit\-gap analysis, and translate business needs into functional design recommendations.
* Execute testing activities, support defect resolution, and help drive issue tracking through implementation and stabilization phases.
* Collaborate with client stakeholders and cross\-functional teams to improve finance processes across Order to Cash and Procure to Pay cycles.
* Work with onsite and offshore team members to deliver project work products on time and support day\-to\-day engagement needs.

**The team**


The Enterprise Operations Portfolio is a suite of offerings designed to help clients maximize value from their Finance, Supply Chain, and IT operations. By taking a holistic approach—from strategy development to process design and technology enablement—we support clients in overcoming operational challenges and managing key business functions. As organizations pursue digital transformation, these areas become vital in shaping interactions with customers, suppliers, and stakeholders. By integrating strategy, operational improvement, implementation, and managed services, we creatively deploy resources and drive innovation, ensuring clients achieve impactful, sustainable results at the speed demanded by today’s dynamic market.

**Location:** Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai

**Shift Timings:** 24\*7 rotational shifts including night shifts as per business requirements

**Qualifications**


Required:

* 2\-3 years of experience supporting Oracle Financials modules, including General Ledger, Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, and Cash Management.
* Experience supporting at least one full\-cycle Oracle Financials implementation.
* Experience in business requirements gathering, fit\-gap analysis, solution design, configuration, and testing.
* Experience collaborating with clients on finance process enhancement initiatives.
* Experience working across end\-to\-end Order to Cash and Procure to Pay processes.
* Experience working in onsite\-offshore delivery models.
* BE, B.Tech, M.C.A., M.Sc. (Computer Science), or equivalent degree from an accredited university.

Preferred:

* Experience leading an Oracle applications workstream.
* Experience with Oracle Cloud Projects modules.
**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.
